abilities functions events cards

ABILITIES

add_resourceadds resources based on specific computations
add_scriptadds a script to a target card
add_threatadds threat to subjects
ask_integer
attach_to_cardattach script owner to subject
attack
cancel_current_encounterdiscards the current encounter into villain discard, not executing its reveal or any other content
change_formchange hero form
conditional_scriptallows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition check
constraintsan ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...
count_tokenscount number of tokens of a specific type
deal_damagedeal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damage
deal_encounterdeal an encounter to current hero
deck_infinity_stone
defeat
detach
discard
discard_infinity_stone
draw_boost_card
draw_cardsthe owner of [subject]cards draws cards
draw_to_hand_size
enemy_activates
enemy_attacks_engaged_hero
enemy_attacks_you
enemy_schemessubject enemy (typically the villain) starts a scheme action
execute_scriptsruns card.execute_scripts for a specific card and trigger
exhaust_cardexhausts [subject] cards. See ready_card
flip_doublesided_card
healheal [subjects]. Can be used as a cost, in which case the heal must happen at least partially for the cost to be considered paid
host_cardowner of the script will become the host of the subjects. Can be used to steal cards for example
i_attackcurrent script owner attacks a series of subjects
indirect_damage
mod_tokensmodify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...
modify_propertiesmodify specific properties of the card (also see alterants)
move_card_to_boardmove [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid location
move_card_to_containermove [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)
move_to_player_zonemove [subject]cards to a specific hero board
move_token_tomoves some specific token from 'source' to 'subject' If number of tokens is not enough, still moves as many as possible
nopdoes nothing, but used for example to ensure some conditioi is met, as a cost
pay_costpay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's cost
pay_regular_costtrigger to initiate the card's cost payment
preventprevents damage (also see replacement_effect)
ready_cardready a specific card (also see exhaust)
receive_damagealso see deal_damage
remove_threatremoves threat from [subject] schemes. Also see thwart.
replacement_effectreplaces some task on the stack with something else (e.g. damage replaced, targets, replaced, etc...)
return_attachments_to
return_attachments_to_ownerreturns attachments of the script's owner to their respective owners
reveal_encounterreveal encounter by trying multiple sources, first looking into subjects, then falling back to src_container, and finally into the villain's deck
reveal_encountersreveals encounters as described by subjects, otherwise fails
reveal_nemesisReveals the current hero's nemesis
sequenceinitiates a sequence of multiple script calls on multiple calls. Specifically used for Black Panther
set_active_villain
set_defender
shuffle_card_into_containershullfes subject cards into dest_container
shuffle_container
surgetriggers an encounter surge
swap_villain
temporary_effectadds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)
thwarteither removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threat
tuck_card_under_me
victory
view_card
villain_and_enemies_attack_youTriggers an attack of the Villain and enemies engaged with current hero
villain_attacks_youTriggers an attack of the villain against current hero

add_resource

adds resources based on specific computations

params:

  • amount
  • resource_name

cards

Enhanced Awareness, Super-Soldier Serum, The Power of Leadership, Pepper Potts, Peter Parker, The Power of Aggression, The Power of Justice, The Power of Leadership, The Power of Protection, Web-Shooter, Band Together, Energy Duplication, Karmic Staff, Web-Shooter, Expert Marksman, Finesse,

add_script

adds a script to a target card

params:

  • end_condition
  • is_cost
  • subject
  • subject_count
  • src_container
  • filter_state_tutor
  • script

cards

Make the Call, Make the Call, Vision, Hela's Domain, Make the Call, Moxie, Power Man - Victor Alvarez, Rain Fire, The Mad Titan, Goliath - Bill Foster, Hawkeye's Quiver,

add_threat

adds threat to subjects

params:

  • amount
  • subject
  • per_boardseek
  • subject_count
  • filter_state_seek
  • is_cost
  • plus_amount

cards

params:

  • ask_int_min
  • ask_int_max

cards

attach_to_card

attach script owner to subject

params:

  • subject
  • needs_subject
  • filter_state_subject

cards

attack

params:

  • subject
  • amount

  • filter_state_subject

  • selection_count
  • selection_type
  • needs_selection

move_token_to

moves some specific token from 'source' to 'subject' If number of tokens is not enough, still moves as many as possible

params:

  • token_name
  • source
  • amount
  • subject
  • filter_state_subject
  • tags

cards

Vibranium Suit,

nop

does nothing, but used for example to ensure some conditioi is met, as a cost

params:

  • subject
  • subject_index
  • subject_count
  • src_container
  • selection_type
  • needs_selection
  • fail_cost_on_skip
  • is_cost
  • filter_state_trigger

cards

Falcon - Sam Wilson, The Power of Leadership, Energy Daggers, Stark Tower, The Power of Aggression, The Power of Justice, The Power of Leadership, The Power of Protection, Sanctuary, The Armies of Thanos, Under Siege, Electric Arrow, Explosive Arrow, Sonic Arrow, The Red House,

pay_cost

pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's cost

params:

  • selection_optional
  • cost
  • is_cost

cards

Android Efficiency #01144a, Android Efficiency #01144b, Android Efficiency #01144c, Black Widow - Natasha Romanoff, Captain Marvel, Concussion Blasters, Energy Channel, Enhanced Ivory Horn, Program Transmitter, Rocket Boots, Solid-Sound Body, Sonic Boom, Sonic Converter, Superhuman Law Division, Tenacity, Upgraded Drones, Vibranium Armor, Vision, Blade - Eric Brooks, Corvus's Glaive, Frozen, Loki's Cape, Loki's Crown, Loki's Staff, Marvel Boy - Noh-Varr, Pip the Troll, Proxima's Spear, Restrained, Sanctuary, Sap Power, Seduced, Thanos's Armor, Thanos's Helmet, Avalanche!, Ball and Chain, Clint Barton, Combat Knife, Crossfire's Rifle, Elektra, Energy Shield, Exo-Suit, Hydra Sidearm, Laser Rifle, Mockingbird - Bobbi Morse, Moon Knight - Marc Spector, Power Gauntlets, Red Skull's Luger, Red Skull's Right Hook, Shang-Chi, Taskmaster's Shield, Taskmaster's Sword, White Tiger - Angela Del Toro,

pay_regular_cost

trigger to initiate the card's cost payment

params:

  • is_cost
  • cost

cards

Make the Call, Make the Call, Make the Call,

prevent

prevents damage (also see replacement_effect)

params:

  • subject

cards

Captain America's Helmet, Shield Block, Backflip, Biomechanical Upgrades, Cosmic Flight, Emergency, Enhanced Spider-Sense, Get Behind Me!, Jennifer Walters, Killmonger, Webbed Up, Abjuration, Cosmic Ward, Master of Illusions, Odin's Torment, Shield Spell, Thanos's Armor, The Armies of Thanos, Under Siege, Zealot of Truth, Field Agent, Sand Form, Mockingbird - Bobbi Morse,

ready_card

ready a specific card (also see exhaust)

params:

  • subject
  • subject_count
  • filter_state_seek

cards

Avengers Assemble!, Captain America, Arc Reactor, Get Ready, Indomitable, One-Two Punch, Tenacity, Major Victory - Vance Astro, Pulsar Shield, Ready to Rumble, Warlock's Cape, Agent 13 - Sharon Carter, Double Life, Spider-Man - Peter Parker, Earth's Mightiest Heroes, Hawkeye, Self-Propelled Glide, Sky Cycle,

receive_damage

also see deal_damage

params:

  • subject
  • amount
  • is_cost

cards

Electromagnetic Backlash, Focused Rage, Great Responsibility, Hydra Bomber, Sound Manipulation, War Machine - James Rhodes, Black Order Besieger, Draugr, Hunted by Hydra, Hydra Bomber, Hydra Hunter,

remove_threat

removes threat from [subject] schemes. Also see thwart.

params:

  • amount
  • needs_subject
  • subject
  • filter_state_subject

cards

Agent 13 - Sharon Carter, Chase Them Down, Interrogation Room, Nick Fury, Spider-Tracer, Surveillance Team, Adam Warlock #21031a, Determination, Living Tribunal, Photon, Quasar - Wendell Vaughn, Homeland Intervention, Jefferson Davis, Surveillance Team, Spider-Man - Peter Parker, White Tiger - Angela Del Toro,

replacement_effect

replaces some task on the stack with something else (e.g. damage replaced, targets, replaced, etc...)

params:

  • subject
  • replacements

cards

Armored Rhino Suit, Great Responsibility, Sonic Boom, Sonic Converter, Sweeping Swoop, Frost Giant, Marvel Boy - Noh-Varr, Supergiant, Crossbones - 1, Crossbones - 2, Crossbones - 3, Crossbones' Armor, Crossfire, Hawkeye's Bow, Photographic Reflexes, The Red House, War Machine - James Rhodes,

return_attachments_to

params:

  • dest_container
  • subject

cards

Odin's Torment, Captured by Hydra,

return_attachments_to_owner

returns attachments of the script's owner to their respective owners

params:

  • dest_container
  • tags

cards

Highway Robbery, Hydra Prison, Marked for Death,

reveal_encounter

reveal encounter by trying multiple sources, first looking into subjects, then falling back to src_container, and finally into the villain's deck

params:

  • src_container
  • subject
  • subject_count

cards

Black Widow - Natasha Romanoff, Under Fire, All Hail King Loki, Casket of Ancient Winters, Infinite Mischief, Madness on Midgard, Open the Bifrost, War in Asgard, New World Hydra,

reveal_encounters

reveals encounters as described by subjects, otherwise fails

params:

  • is_else
  • subject
  • subject_count
  • subject_index
  • src_container

cards

Masterplan, Loki - 1 #21160, Loki - 1 #21161, Loki - 1 #21162, Loki - 1 #21163, Loki - 1 #21164, Sand Form, Attack on Mount Athena, Ball and Chain, Crossbones - 3, Raid the Armory, The Getaway, The Infinity Stone, The Rise of Red Skull, Zola - 3,

reveal_nemesis

Reveals the current hero's nemesis

params:

cards

Shadow of the Past,

sequence

initiates a sequence of multiple script calls on multiple calls. Specifically used for Black Panther

params:

  • sequence_ability
  • subject
  • subject_count
  • selection_type
  • needs_selection
  • filter_state_seek

cards

Wakanda Forever!, Infinity Gauntlet, Defense Mechanism, Dirt Trap, Power Within, Sand Clone, Sand Form, Sand Smash, Sandman - 1, Sandman - 2, Sandman - 3, Sandslide, Swing In, Web-Shot,

set_active_villain

params:

  • subject

cards

Focused Defense,

set_defender

params:

  • is_cost
  • subject
  • _comments

cards

Pulsar Shield,

shuffle_card_into_container

shullfes subject cards into dest_container

params:

  • src_container
  • dest_container
  • subject
  • subject_count
  • selection_count
  • selection_type
  • needs_selection

cards

Ancestral Knowledge, Eternity, In-Betweener, Living Tribunal, The Gardener, Miles Morales, Sand Storm, Ball and Chain, Censor the Past, Zola's Mutate,

shuffle_container

params:

  • dest_container

cards

surge

triggers an encounter surge

params:

  • is_else
  • amount

cards

Assault, Caught Off Guard, Eviction Notice, Explosion, False Alarm, Family Emergency, Gang-Up, Genetically Enhanced, Hard to Keep Down, "I'm Tough", Repair Sequence, Sound Manipulation, Stampede, Sweeping Swoop, Titania's Fury, Yon-Rogg's Treason, Agent of Thanos, Beguiled, Legions of Hel, Keeping Secrets, Razor Claws, Slice and Dice, Defensive Programming, Full Auto, Neurological Implants, Pain Inhibitors, Stall Tactics, Weapon Master,

swap_villain

params:

  • options
  • src_container
  • subject
  • sort_by
  • subject_count
  • filter_state_tutor

cards

Casket of Ancient Winters, Hela - A2, Madness on Midgard, Odin's Torment, Open the Bifrost, The Trickster, War in Asgard,

temporary_effect

adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)

params:

  • end_condition
  • effect
  • subject

cards

Avengers Assemble!, Expert Defense, Fearless Determination, Lead from the Front, Rocket Boots, Adam Warlock #21031a, Proxima Midnight - 1, Proxima Midnight - 2, Proxima Midnight - 3, Pulsar Shield, Dum Dum Dugan, Sand Smash, Berserk Mutate, Self-Propelled Glide, Swinging Stone,

thwart

either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threat

params:

  • subject
  • amount
  • needs_subject
  • filter_state_subject

cards

victory

view_card

  • target_include_piles

villain_and_enemies_attack_you

Triggers an attack of the Villain and enemies engaged with current hero

cards

villain_attacks_you

Triggers an attack of the villain against current hero

params:

  • tags
  • if_damage

FUNCTIONS

!card_is_in_play
!count_cards
!identity_has_traitreturns true if your identity doesn't have the trait, false if it does
card_is_in_playReturns true if card_name is in play
check_validity
count_attachments
count_boost_iconsReturns number of boost icons on subject
count_cards
count_different_aspects
count_printed_resourcesReturns number of resources of resource_type printed on subject card
count_resource_typescounts the number of resource *types* in a list of subjects
count_tokenscount number of tokens of a specific type
count_unique_property_value
current_activation_statusreturns true if the current activation (attack, scheme, encounter...) matches the passed params. e.g. to check if attack is undefended
get_aspect_name
get_hero_id
get_interrupted_event_property
get_remaining_damagereturns remaining damage (health - damage) for subject card
get_scenario_option_value
get_script_bool_propertyreturns script_definition element as a bool
get_subject_int_printed_property
get_subject_int_property
get_sustained_damagereturns sustained damage for subject card (typically, number of damage tokens)
has_trait
identity_has_traitreturns true if your identity has the trait
is_hero_form
paid_with_includesreturns true if this ability was paid for with a specific type of resource

!card_is_in_play

params:

  • card_name

  • subject

  • filter_state_seek

EVENTS

TODO
_comments
_surge
alterantsa special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the board
associated_villain
attack_happenedtriggers after attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if character was stunned
attacks_gain
basic_attack_happened
boostspecial trigger called for card's boost star abilities
boost_alterants
card_attached
card_damagedtriggers when a card receives damage greater than zero
card_defeated
card_moved_to_boardwhen a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)
card_moved_to_piletriggers when a card moves to any pile on the board. Additional filters required to understand which pile
card_playedtriggers when a card is played by a player.
card_token_added
card_token_modified
card_unattached
enemy_attack_happenedtriggers after an enemy attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was stunned
enemy_initiates_attacktriggers when enemy initiates attack
enemy_scheme_happenedtriggers after an enemy scheme event occured. Scheme needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was confused
event_prevented
extra_decks
extra_rules
give_obligationa shortcut macro to give an obligation to its matching player. See _macros.json
hinder
identity_changed_formtriggers when an identity changed from hero to alter_ego or vice versa
incite
interruptspecial trigger used for interrupt checks
interrupt_attack
interrupt_card_dies
interrupt_card_leaves_play
interrupt_receive_damage
interrupt_thwart
last_threat_removed
minion_diedtriggered when a minion dies
minion_moved_to_boardtriggered when a minion moves to the board.Might be easier to use than card_moved_to_board
modifiersa special keyword to modify some aspects of the engine at runtime
on_load
on_reveal_one_threat_per_hero
once_per_phase
once_per_roundspecial macro that creates a token which can limit some specific actions to once per round. see _macros.json
paid_as_resource
phase_endedtriggered when a phase of the game ended (player or villain phase)
pile_emptied
post_activity_trigger
quickstrikemacro for the quickstrike keyword, starts an automated attack
resourcespecial trigger for resource abilities
responsespecial trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interrupts
response_basic_attack_happened
response_basic_thwart_happened
response_card_played
reveal_alter_egospecial trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in alter ego form
reveal_choice
reveal_herospecial trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in hero form
reveal_side_aspecial trigger to reveal the side A of main schemes
round_endedtriggered when a round ends. Also see phase_ended
script_executed
self_moved_to_board
setupspecial trigger for setup on some cards
special
spider_camouflage
step_ended
thwart_happened
usesspecial macro to implement the 'uses' keyword
venom_blast
villain_step_one_threat_addedtriggers when threat was added during step one of the villain phase
villain_swapped

    cap

    Agent 13 - Sharon Carter

    {
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "removes threat from [subject] schemes. Also see thwart.remove_threat",
        "amount": 2,
        "needs_subject": true,
        "subject": "target",
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_schemes"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Avengers Assemble!

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "ready a specific card (also see exhaust)ready_card",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_friendly_my_hero",
            "filter_properties": {
              "trait_avenger": 1,
              "comparison": "ge"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)temporary_effect",
        "end_condition": "triggered when a phase of the game ended (player or villain phase)phase_ended",
        "effect": {
          "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
            "all": [
              {
                "filter_task": "get_property",
                "filter_property_name": "attack",
                "filter_state_trigger": [
                  {
                    "filter_properties": {
                      "trait_avenger": 1,
                      "comparison": "ge"
                    }
                  }
                ],
                "alteration": 1
              },
              {
                "filter_task": "get_property",
                "filter_property_name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
                "filter_state_trigger": [
                  {
                    "filter_properties": {
                      "trait_avenger": 1,
                      "comparison": "ge"
                    }
                  }
                ],
                "alteration": 1
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Avengers Tower

    {
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "ally_limit",
        "filter_same_controller": true,
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities"
          }
        ],
        "alteration": 1
      },
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "cost",
        "alteration": "per_token_self",
        "per_token_self": {
          "token_name": "_avengers_tower",
          "is_inverted": true
        },
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "trait_avenger": 1,
              "comparison": "ge"
            },
            "filter_properties2": {
              "type_code": "ally"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "_comments": "TODO needs to account for allies type"
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "action_ability"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "self",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": 1,
        "token_name": "_avengers_tower"
      }
    ]
  },
  "triggers when a card is played by a player.card_played": {
    "trigger": "another",
    "filter_state_trigger": [
      {
        "filter_properties": {
          "trait_avenger": 1,
          "comparison": "ge"
        },
        "filter_properties2": {
          "type_code": "ally"
        }
      }
    ],
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 0,
        "subject": "self",
        "set_to_mod": true,
        "token_name": "_avengers_tower"
      }
    ]
  },
  "triggered when a phase of the game ended (player or villain phase)phase_ended": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 0,
        "subject": "self",
        "set_to_mod": true,
        "token_name": "_avengers_tower"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Baron Zemo

    {
  "macro for the quickstrike keyword, starts an automated attackquickstrike": {},
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "cannot_thwart",
        "filter_same_controller": true,

    Captain America

    {
  "special macro that creates a token which can limit some specific actions to once per round. see _macros.jsononce_per_round": {
    "__name__": "_ready"
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": {
      "I can do this all day": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "action_ability"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
          "subject": "self",
          "modification": -1,
          "token_name": "_ready",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard",
          "src_container": "hand",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "index",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "selection_count": 1,
          "selection_type": "equal",
          "needs_selection": true
        },
        {
          "name": "ready a specific card (also see exhaust)ready_card",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

    Captain America's Helmet

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "card_dies",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "prevents damage (also see replacement_effect)prevent",
        "subject": "interrupted_event"
      },
      {
        "name": "heal [subjects]. Can be used as a cost, in which case the heal must happen at least partially for the cost to be considered paidheal",
        "subject": "host",
        "set_to_mod": true,
        "amount": 1
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ],
    "trigger": "my_hero"
  }
}

}

    {
  "special macro to implement the 'uses' keyworduses": {
    "__name__": "mental",
    "__amount__": 3
  },
  "special trigger for resource abilitiesresource": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_resource"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "self",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": -1,
        "token_name": "mental",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "adds resources based on specific computationsadd_resource",
        "amount": 1,
        "resource_name": "mental"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Expert Defense

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "event_name": "enemy_attack_damage",
    "event_filters": {
      "target": "my_hero"
    },
    "is_optional_hand": true,
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)temporary_effect",
        "end_condition": "enemy_activation_finished",
        "subject": "my_hero",
        "effect": {
          "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
            "all": [
              {
                "filter_task": "get_property",
                "filter_property_name": "defense",
                "trigger": "my_hero",
                "alteration": 3
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Falcon - Sam Wilson

    {
  "self_moved_to_board": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "does nothing, but used for example to ensure some conditioi is met, as a costnop",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "subject_count": 3,
        "src_container": "deck_villain",
        "selection_type": "display",
        "needs_selection": true
      },
      {
        "name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
        "subject": "target",
        "amount": {
          "func_name": "get_subject_int_property",
          "func_params": {
            "subject": "previous",
            "property": "type_code",
            "property_value": "treachery"
          }
        },
        "needs_subject": true,
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_schemes"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Hail Hydra!

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": {
      "_rules": {
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true,
        "forced": true
      },
      "Hydra Attack": [
        {
          "name": "enemy_attacks_engaged_hero",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "trait_hydra": 1,
                "comparison": "ge"
              },
              "filter_properties2": {
                "type_code": "minion"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true,
          "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
          "subject": "tutor",
          "src_container": [
            "deck_villain",
            "discard_villain"
          ],
          "subject_count": "all",
          "selection_count": 1,
          "selection_type": "equal",
          "needs_selection": true,
          "filter_state_tutor": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "trait_hydra": 1,
                "comparison": "ge"
              },
              "filter_properties2": {
                "type_code": "minion"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

    Heroic Strike

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "attack",
        "subject": "target",
        "amount": 6,
        "needs_subject": true,
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_enemies"
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "returns true if this ability was paid for with a specific type of resourcepaid_with_includes",
            "func_params": {
              "physical": 1
            }
          },
          "then": 1,
          "else": 0
        },
        "token_name": "stunned",
        "subject": "previous"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Make the Call

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "adds a script to a target cardadd_script",
        "end_condition": "before_card_moved_to_board",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "tutor",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "src_container": "any_discard",
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_allies"
          }
        ],
        "script": {
          "manual": {
            "pile": [
              {
                "name": "trigger to initiate the card's cost paymentpay_regular_cost",
                "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
                "cost": "card_cost"
              },
              {
                "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
                "subject": "self"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Man Out of Time

    {
  "a shortcut macro to give an obligation to its matching player. See _macros.jsongive_obligation": {
    "__to__": "Steve Rogers"
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true
      },
      "Flip then Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity",
          "_comments": "we need to exhaust before changing form here due to a bug"
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",

        {

        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",

          "subject_count": "all",
          "selection_count": "per_tutor",

            "subject_count": "all",

          "selection_type": "equal",

        },
        {

    Quinjet

    {
  "triggered when a round ends. Also see phase_endedround_ended": {
    "_silent": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": 1,
        "token_name": "time"
      }
    ]
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "action_ability"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
        "subject": "tutor",
        "src_container": "hand",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": 1,
        "selection_type": "equal",
        "selection_optional": true,
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "cost": {
                "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",
                "func_params": {
                  "token_name": "time"
                }
              },
              "comparison": "le"
            },
            "filter_properties2": {
              "type_code": "ally"
            },
            "filter_properties3": {
              "trait_avenger": 1,
              "comparison": "ge"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "self",
        "dest_container": "discard"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Steve Rogers

    {
  "special macro that creates a token which can limit some specific actions to once per round. see _macros.jsononce_per_round": {
    "__name__": "__ally_cost_reduction"
  },
  "special trigger for setup on some cardssetup": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "src_container": [
          "deck",
          "discard"
        ],
        "dest_container": "hand",
        "subject": "tutor",
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Captain America's Shield"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "cost",
        "alteration": "per_token_self",
        "per_token_self": {
          "token_name": "__ally_cost_reduction",
          "is_inverted": true
        },
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_properties2": {
              "type_code": "ally"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "triggers when a card is played by a player.card_played": {
    "trigger": "another",
    "filter_state_trigger": [
      {
        "filter_properties2": {
          "type_code": "ally"
        }
      }
    ],
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 0,
        "subject": "self",
        "set_to_mod": true,
        "token_name": "__ally_cost_reduction"
      }
    ]
  }
}

  "reveal": {
    "all": [

        "ultron_drone": {
          "__count__": 1,

        }

  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true
      },
      "Pay resource": [
        {
          "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
          "selection_optional": false,
          "cost": {
            "energy": 1
          },
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
        }
      ],
      "Drone": [
        {
          "ultron_drone": {
            "__count__": 1,
            "__each_player__": false,
            "__src_container__": "deck_current_hero_target"
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

    Arc Reactor

    {
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "self",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "ready a specific card (also see exhaust)ready_card",
        "subject": "my_hero"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Armored Rhino Suit

    {
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify specific properties of the card (also see alterants)modify_properties",

          "Init"
        ],
        "subject": "self",

  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "also see deal_damagereceive_damage",
    "event_filters": {
      "target": "villain"
    },
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "replaces some task on the stack with something else (e.g. damage replaced, targets, replaced, etc...)replacement_effect",
        "subject": "interrupted_event",
        "replacements": {
          "subject": "self"
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Armored Vest

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "max_per_hero_any": 1
      }
    ]
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject]cards to a specific hero boardmove_to_player_zone",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": 1,
        "selection_type": "equal",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities",
            "filter_max_per_hero": 1
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "defense",
        "filter_same_controller": true,
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities"
          }
        ],
        "alteration": 1
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Assault

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",

    Assault on NORAD

    {
  "special trigger to reveal the side A of main schemesreveal_side_a": {

    "trigger": "self",
    "board": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true,
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true
      },
      "2 Threat": [
        {
          "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
          "amount": 2,
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],

          "ultron_drone": {
            "__count__": 1,
            "__each_player__": false,
            "__src_container__": "deck_my_hero"

    Black Widow - Natasha Romanoff

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "called before an encounter reveal event. Used for interrupts that prevent revealingabout_to_reveal",
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "self",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
        "cost": {
          "mental": 1
        },
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "discards the current encounter into villain discard, not executing its reveal or any other contentcancel_current_encounter"
      },
      {
        "name": "reveal encounter by trying multiple sources, first looking into subjects, then falling back to src_container, and finally into the villain's deckreveal_encounter",
        "src_container": "deck_villain"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Business Problems

    {
  "a shortcut macro to give an obligation to its matching player. See _macros.jsongive_obligation": {
    "__to__": "Tony Stark"
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true
      },
      "Flip then Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity",
          "_comments": "we need to exhaust before changing form here due to a bug"
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "alter_ego_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Flip then Exhaust upgrades": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard_villain",
          "subject": "self"
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_group": "group_upgrade_support_my_hero",
              "filter_properties": {
                "type_code": "upgrade"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      ],
      "Exhaust upgrades": [
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard",
          "src_container": "hand",
          "subject": "index",
          "subject_count": 1,
          "subject_index": "random"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard_villain",
          "subject": "self"
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_group": "group_upgrade_support_my_hero"
            },
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "type_code": "upgrade"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "event_name": "enemy_died",
    "event_filters": {
      "source": "my_hero",
      "tags": [
        "attack"
      ]
    },

        "subject": "target",
        "needs_subject": true,

}

  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject]cards to a specific hero boardmove_to_player_zone",
        "subject": "boardseek",

    Crisis Interdiction

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
        "subject": "target",
        "amount": 2,
        "needs_subject": true,
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_schemes"
          }
        ],
        "tags": [
          "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
        "subject": "target",
        "amount": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "returns true if your identity has the traitidentity_has_trait",
            "func_params": {
              "trait": "aerial"
            }
          },
          "then": 2,
          "else": 0
        },
        "needs_subject": true,
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_schemes"
          }
        ],
        "tags": [
          "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    {
  "a shortcut macro to give an obligation to its matching player. See _macros.jsongive_obligation": {
    "__to__": "Peter Parker"
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true
      },
      "Flip then Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity",
          "_comments": "we need to exhaust before changing form here due to a bug"
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "alter_ego_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Flip then Discard 1": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard",
          "src_container": "hand",
          "subject": "index",
          "subject_count": 1,
          "subject_index": "random"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard_villain",
          "subject": "self"
        },
        {
          "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge"
        }
      ],
      "Discard 1": [
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard",
          "src_container": "hand",
          "subject": "index",

      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "token_name": "confused",
        "modification": 1,
        "subject": "my_identity",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge",
        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Family Emergency

    {
  "a shortcut macro to give an obligation to its matching player. See _macros.jsongive_obligation": {
    "__to__": "Carol Davners"
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true
      },
      "Flip then Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity",
          "_comments": "we need to exhaust before changing form here due to a bug"
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "alter_ego_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Flip then get stunned": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
          "modification": 1,
          "token_name": "stunned",
          "subject": "my_identity"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard_villain",
          "subject": "self"
        },
        {
          "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge"
        }
      ],
      "Get Stunned": [
        {
          "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
          "modification": 1,
          "token_name": "stunned",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard_villain",
          "subject": "self"
        },
        {
          "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

    Get Behind Me!

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "reveal encounter by trying multiple sources, first looking into subjects, then falling back to src_container, and finally into the villain's deckreveal_encounter",
    "is_optional_hand": true,
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_interrupt"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "prevents damage (also see replacement_effect)prevent",
        "subject": "interrupted_event"
      },
      {

      }
    ],
    "filter_state_trigger": [

        "filter_properties": {

        }
      }

    {
  "triggers after attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if character was stunnedattack_happened": {

              "func_name": "Returns number of resources of resource_type printed on subject cardcount_printed_resources",

          "subject": "my_identity",
          "amount": 2
        }
      ],
      "1 Threat on Main Scheme": [
        {
          "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
          "amount": 1,
          "subject": "main_scheme"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

    {
  "manual": {

        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",

  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {

      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "attack",
        "trigger": "host",
        "alteration": 1
      },
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
        "trigger": "host",

      }

  }

    Interrogation Room

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "max_per_hero": 1
      }
    ]
  },
  "triggered when a minion diesminion_died": {
    "filter_source_controlled_by": "my_hero",
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "self",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "removes threat from [subject] schemes. Also see thwart.remove_threat",
        "amount": 1,
        "subject": "target",
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_schemes"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Invasive AI

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "tutor",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "up_to": true,
        "subject_count": 3,
        "src_container": "deck",
        "dest_container": "discard",
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Iron Man

    {
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",

        }

  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "hand_size",
        "trigger": "self",

          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": "all",

            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "comparison": "gt",
                "trait_tech": 0
              },

                "type_code": "upgrade"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "alteration": "per_boardseek"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Jennifer Walters

    {
  "special macro that creates a token which can limit some specific actions to once per round. see _macros.jsononce_per_round": {
    "__name__": "__jennifer_resource"
  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": -1,
        "token_name": "__jennifer_resource",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "prevents damage (also see replacement_effect)prevent",
        "amount": 1,
        "subject": "interrupted_event"
      }
    ]
  }
}

        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true,

    Kree Manipulator

    {
  "_surge": {},
  "reveal": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
        "amount": 1,
        "subject": "main_scheme"
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
        "amount": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "returns true if the current activation (attack, scheme, encounter...) matches the passed params. e.g. to check if attack is undefendedcurrent_activation_status",
            "func_params": {
              "undefended": true
            }
          },
          "then": 1,
          "else": 0
        },
        "subject": "main_scheme"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Lead from the Front

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)temporary_effect",
        "end_condition": "triggered when a phase of the game ended (player or villain phase)phase_ended",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "needs_subject": true,
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": 1,
        "selection_type": "equal",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities"
          }
        ],
        "effect": {
          "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
            "all": [
              {
                "filter_task": "get_property",
                "filter_property_name": "attack",
                "filter_state_trigger": [
                  {
                    "filter_group": "group_characters{__subject_hero_id__}"
                  }
                ],
                "alteration": 1
              },
              {
                "filter_task": "get_property",
                "filter_property_name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
                "filter_state_trigger": [
                  {
                    "filter_group": "group_characters{__subject_hero_id__}"
                  }
                ],
                "alteration": 1
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Legal Practice

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "alter_ego_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "src_container": "hand",
        "dest_container": "discard",
        "subject": "index",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject_count": "all",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "selection_count": 5,
        "selection_type": "max",
        "selection_optional": true,
        "selection_ignore_self": true
      },
      {
        "name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
        "amount": "count_previous_subjects",
        "subject": "target",
        "subject_count": "1",
        "needs_subject": true,
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_schemes"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Legal Work

    {
  "a shortcut macro to give an obligation to its matching player. See _macros.jsongive_obligation": {
    "__to__": "Jennifer Walters"
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true
      },
      "Flip then Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity",
          "_comments": "we need to exhaust before changing form here due to a bug"
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "alter_ego_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Flip then Accelerate": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard_villain",
          "subject": "self"
        },
        {
          "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
          "token_name": "acceleration",
          "modification": 1,
          "subject": "main_scheme"
        }
      ],
      "Accelerate": [
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard_villain",
          "subject": "self"
        },
        {
          "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
          "token_name": "acceleration",
          "modification": 1,
          "subject": "main_scheme"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

  "triggers after an enemy attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was stunnedenemy_attack_happened": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
        "amount": 2,
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Legions of Hydra"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "triggers after an enemy scheme event occured. Scheme needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was confusedenemy_scheme_happened": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
        "amount": 2,
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Legions of Hydra"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Make the Call

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "adds a script to a target cardadd_script",
        "end_condition": "before_card_moved_to_board",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "tutor",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "src_container": "any_discard",
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_allies"
          }
        ],
        "script": {
          "manual": {
            "pile": [
              {
                "name": "trigger to initiate the card's cost paymentpay_regular_cost",
                "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
                "cost": "card_cost"
              },
              {
                "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
                "subject": "self"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

            }

        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },

        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true,
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",

              "type_code": "side_scheme"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true,
        "name": "reveals encounters as described by subjects, otherwise failsreveal_encounters",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "subject_index": "retrieve_integer",
        "src_container": "deck_villain"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Med Team

    {
  "special macro to implement the 'uses' keyworduses": {
    "__name__": "medical",
    "__amount__": 3
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "action_ability"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "self",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": -1,
        "token_name": "medical",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "heal [subjects]. Can be used as a cost, in which case the heal must happen at least partially for the cost to be considered paidheal",
        "amount": 2,
        "subject": "target",
        "needs_subject": true,
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_friendly"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

        }

          "amount": 4,

  }

    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"

      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "self",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true

          "mental": 1
        },
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)temporary_effect",
        "end_condition": "triggered when a phase of the game ended (player or villain phase)phase_ended",
        "subject": "my_hero",
        "effect": {
          "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
            "all": [
              {
                "filter_task": "get_property",
                "filter_property_name": "trait_aerial",
                "filter_state_trigger": [
                  {
                    "filter_card_name": "Iron Man"
                  }
                ],
                "alteration": 1
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

  "special trigger to reveal the side A of main schemesreveal_side_a": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "grab_until",
        "src_container": "deck_villain",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "filter_state_grab_until": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "minion"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "grid_name": "enemies_first_player",
        "subject_index": "retrieve_integer",
        "src_container": "deck_villain"
      }
    ]
  }
}
