    She-Hulk

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "event_name": "triggers when an identity changed from hero to alter_ego or vice versaidentity_changed_form",
    "event_filters": {
      "after": "hero"
    },
    "trigger": "self",
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "deal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damagedeal_damage",
        "amount": 2,
        "subject": "target",
        "needs_subject": true,
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_enemies"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Solid-Sound Body

    {
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "villain"
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "retaliate",
        "trigger": "host",
        "alteration": 1
      }
    ]
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
        "cost": {
          "physical": 1,
          "mental": 1,
          "energy": 1
        },
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Sonic Boom

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true
      },
      "pay resources": [
        {
          "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "selection_optional": false,
          "cost": {
            "physical": 1,
            "mental": 1,
            "energy": 1
          }
        }
      ],
      "exhaust all characters": [
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_group": "group_friendly_my_hero"
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "replaces some task on the stack with something else (e.g. damage replaced, targets, replaced, etc...)replacement_effect",
        "subject": "current_activation",
        "replacements": {
          "additional_tags": [
            "exhaust_if_damage"
          ]
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Sound Manipulation

    {
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in alter ego formreveal_alter_ego": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "heal [subjects]. Can be used as a cost, in which case the heal must happen at least partially for the cost to be considered paidheal",
        "amount": 4,
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "shortname": "Klaw"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge",
        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in hero formreveal_hero": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "heal [subjects]. Can be used as a cost, in which case the heal must happen at least partially for the cost to be considered paidheal",
        "amount": 2,
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "shortname": "Klaw"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "also see deal_damagereceive_damage",
        "amount": 2,
        "subject": "my_hero"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {

    "trigger": "self",
    "board": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true
      },
      "1 Threat on Main Scheme": [
        {
          "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
          "amount": 1,
          "subject": "main_scheme"

            "__count__": 1,

    Vibranium Suit

    {
  "special": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "moves some specific token from 'source' to 'subject' If number of tokens is not enough, still moves as many as possiblemove_token_to",
        "token_name": "damage",
        "source": "my_hero",
        "amount": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "returns script_definition element as a boolget_script_bool_property",
            "func_params": {
              "property": "sequence_is_last"
            }
          },
          "then": 2,
          "else": 1
        },
        "subject": "target",
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_enemies"
          }
        ],
        "tags": [
          "attack"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Vision

    {
  "special macro that creates a token which can limit some specific actions to once per round. see _macros.jsononce_per_round": {
    "__name__": "_vision_ability"
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": {
      "+2 Attack": [
        {
          "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
          "modification": -1,
          "subject": "self",
          "token_name": "_vision_ability",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
        },
        {
          "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
          "cost": {
            "energy": 1
          },
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
        },
        {
          "name": "adds a script to a target cardadd_script",
          "end_condition": "triggered when a phase of the game ended (player or villain phase)phase_ended",
          "subject": "self",
          "script": {
            "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
              "board": [
                {
                  "filter_task": "get_property",
                  "filter_property_name": "attack",
                  "trigger": "self",
                  "alteration": 2
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      ],
      "+2 Thwart": [
        {
          "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
          "modification": -1,
          "subject": "self",
          "token_name": "_vision_ability",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
        },
        {
          "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
          "cost": {
            "energy": 1
          },
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
        },
        {
          "name": "adds a script to a target cardadd_script",
          "end_condition": "triggered when a phase of the game ended (player or villain phase)phase_ended",
          "subject": "self",
          "script": {
            "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
              "board": [
                {
                  "filter_task": "get_property",
                  "filter_property_name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
                  "trigger": "self",
                  "alteration": 2
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

  "macro for the quickstrike keyword, starts an automated attackquickstrike": {}

    Wakanda Forever!

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "initiates a sequence of multiple script calls on multiple calls. Specifically used for Black Panthersequence",
        "sequence_ability": "special",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_type": "all",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "trait_black_panther": 1
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

        {

          "tags": [

          ]

        },
        {
          "name": "also see deal_damagereceive_damage",
          "amount": 2,

            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

    Web-Shooter

    {
  "special macro to implement the 'uses' keyworduses": {
    "__name__": "web",
    "__amount__": 3
  },
  "special trigger for resource abilitiesresource": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_resource"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "self",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": -1,
        "token_name": "web",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "adds resources based on specific computationsadd_resource",
        "amount": 1,
        "resource_name": "wild"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Webbed Up

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_form"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "target",
        "needs_subject": true,
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_enemies",
            "filter_max_per_host": 1
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "triggers when enemy initiates attackenemy_initiates_attack",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 1,
        "token_name": "stunned",
        "needs_subject": true,
        "subject": "host"
      },
      {
        "name": "prevents damage (also see replacement_effect)prevent",
        "subject": "interrupted_event"
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "self",
        "dest_container": "discard"
      }
    ],
    "filter_state_trigger": [
      {
        "filter_is_host_of": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Whirlwind

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "triggers when enemy initiates attackenemy_initiates_attack",
    "trigger": "self",
    "event_filters": {
      "target": "my_hero"
    },
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "current script owner attacks a series of subjectsi_attack",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_exclude": "my_hero",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "hero"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "deal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damagedeal_damage",
        "amount": 1,
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "hero"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Yon-Rogg

    {
  "triggers after an enemy attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was stunnedenemy_attack_happened": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
        "amount": 1,
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "The Psyche-Magnitron"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "trigger": "self"
  }
}

    Yon-Rogg's Treason

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "discard",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "tutor",
        "src_container": "hand",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "resource_energy": 1,
              "comparison": "ge"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge",
        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Abjuration

    {
  "self_moved_to_board": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "Ebony Maw"
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "also see deal_damagereceive_damage",
    "event_filters": {
      "target": "host"
    },
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "prevents damage (also see replacement_effect)prevent",
        "amount": "all",
        "subject": "interrupted_event"
      }
    ]
  },
  "event_prevented": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "event_filters": {
      "amount_prevented": ">1",
      "tags": [
        "attack"
      ]
    },
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "self",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Adam Warlock #21031a

    {
  "once_per_phase": {
    "__name__": "_battle_mage"
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": {
      "Battle Mage": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_action"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
          "subject": "self",
          "modification": -1,
          "token_name": "_battle_mage",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "src_container": "hand",
          "dest_container": "discard",
          "subject": "index",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject_count": "all",
          "needs_selection": true,
          "selection_count": 1,
          "selection_type": "equal",
          "selection_optional": true,
          "selection_ignore_self": true
        },
        {
          "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
          "options": [
            {
              "condition": {
                "func_name": "check_validity",
                "func_params": {
                  "subject": "previous",
                  "filter_state_trigger": [
                    {
                      "filter_properties": {
                        "aspect": "aggression"
                      }
                    }
                  ]
                }
              },
              "nested_tasks": [
                {
                  "name": "deal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damagedeal_damage",
                  "subject": "target",
                  "amount": 2,
                  "needs_subject": true,
                  "filter_state_subject": [
                    {
                      "filter_group": "group_enemies"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              ]
            },
            {
              "condition": {
                "func_name": "check_validity",
                "func_params": {
                  "subject": "previous",
                  "filter_state_trigger": [
                    {
                      "filter_properties": {
                        "aspect": "justice"
                      }
                    }
                  ]
                }
              },
              "nested_tasks": [
                {
                  "name": "removes threat from [subject] schemes. Also see thwart.remove_threat",
                  "subject": "target",
                  "amount": 2,
                  "needs_subject": true,
                  "filter_state_subject": [
                    {
                      "filter_group": "group_schemes"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              ]
            },
            {
              "condition": {
                "func_name": "check_validity",
                "func_params": {
                  "subject": "previous",
                  "filter_state_trigger": [
                    {
                      "filter_properties": {
                        "aspect": "protection"
                      }
                    }
                  ]
                }
              },
              "nested_tasks": [
                {
                  "name": "heal [subjects]. Can be used as a cost, in which case the heal must happen at least partially for the cost to be considered paidheal",
                  "subject": "target",
                  "amount": 1,
                  "needs_subject": true,
                  "filter_state_subject": [
                    {
                      "filter_group": "group_allies"
                    }
                  ]
                }
              ]
            },
            {
              "condition": {
                "func_name": "check_validity",
                "func_params": {
                  "subject": "previous",
                  "filter_state_trigger": [
                    {
                      "filter_properties": {
                        "aspect": "leadership"
                      }
                    }
                  ]
                }
              },
              "nested_tasks": [
                {
                  "name": "adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)temporary_effect",
                  "end_condition": "triggered when a round ends. Also see phase_endedround_ended",
                  "subject": "boardseek",
                  "needs_subject": true,
                  "subject_count": "all",
                  "selection_count": 1,
                  "selection_type": "equal",
                  "needs_selection": true,
                  "filter_state_seek": [
                    {
                      "filter_group": "group_identities",
                      "filter_properties": {
                        "type_code": "hero"
                      }
                    }
                  ],
                  "effect": {
                    "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
                      "all": [
                        {
                          "filter_task": "get_property",
                          "filter_property_name": "attack",
                          "filter_state_trigger": [
                            {
                              "filter_group": "group_characters{__subject_hero_id__}",
                              "filter_properties": {
                                "type_code": "hero"
                              }
                            }
                          ],
                          "alteration": 1
                        },
                        {
                          "filter_task": "get_property",
                          "filter_property_name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
                          "filter_state_trigger": [
                            {
                              "filter_group": "group_characters{__subject_hero_id__}",
                              "filter_properties": {
                                "type_code": "hero"
                              }
                            }
                          ],
                          "alteration": 1
                        },
                        {
                          "filter_task": "get_property",
                          "filter_property_name": "defense",
                          "filter_state_trigger": [
                            {
                              "filter_group": "group_characters{__subject_hero_id__}",
                              "filter_properties": {
                                "type_code": "hero"
                              }
                            }
                          ],
                          "alteration": 1
                        }
                      ]
                    }
                  }
                }
              ]
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

    Agent of Thanos

    {
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in alter ego formreveal_alter_ego": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "amount": "per_boardseek",
        "subject": "main_scheme",
        "per_boardseek": {
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_group": "group_environments_my_hero",
              "filter_properties": {
                "trait_spell": 1,
                "comparison": "ge"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge",
        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in hero formreveal_hero": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "deal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damagedeal_damage",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "amount": "per_boardseek",
        "subject": "my_hero",
        "per_boardseek": {
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_group": "group_environments_my_hero",
              "filter_properties": {
                "trait_spell": 1,
                "comparison": "ge"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge",
        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true
      }
    ]
  }
}

    All Hail King Loki

    {
  "special trigger to reveal the side A of main schemesreveal_side_a": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "deal an encounter to current herodeal_encounter",
        "immediate_reveal": true,
        "subject": "tutor",
        "src_container": [
          "deck_villain",
          "discard_villain"
        ],
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "War in Asgard"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "reveal encounter by trying multiple sources, first looking into subjects, then falling back to src_container, and finally into the villain's deckreveal_encounter",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "src_container": "deck_infinity_stone"
      }
    ]
  },
  "triggers when a card moves to any pile on the board. Additional filters required to understand which pilecard_moved_to_pile": {
    "event_filters": {
      "destination": "victory_display"
    },
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "if": {
                "func_name": "count_cards",
                "func_params": {
                  "subject": "tutor",
                  "src_container": "victory_display",
                  "subject_count": "all",
                  "filter_state_tutor": [
                    {
                      "filter_properties": {
                        "shortname": "Loki"
                      }
                    }
                  ]
                },
                "comparison_value": {
                  "func_name": "get_scenario_option_value",
                  "func_params": {
                    "option_name": "loki_victory"
                  }
                },
                "comparison": "ge"
              },
              "then": 1,
              "else": 0
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "victory"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Armored Vest

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "max_per_hero_any": 1
      }
    ]
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject]cards to a specific hero boardmove_to_player_zone",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": 1,
        "selection_type": "equal",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities",
            "filter_max_per_hero": 1
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "defense",
        "filter_same_controller": true,
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities"
          }
        ],
        "alteration": 1
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Avengers Tower #21020

    {
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "ally_limit",
        "filter_same_controller": true,
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities"
          }
        ],
        "alteration": 1
      },
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "cost",
        "alteration": "per_token_self",
        "per_token_self": {
          "token_name": "_avengers_tower",
          "is_inverted": true
        },
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "trait_avenger": 1
            },
            "filter_properties2": {
              "type_code": "ally"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "action_ability"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "self",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": 1,
        "token_name": "_avengers_tower"
      }
    ]
  },
  "triggers when a card is played by a player.card_played": {
    "trigger": "another",
    "filter_state_trigger": [
      {
        "filter_properties": {
          "trait_avenger": 1
        },
        "filter_properties2": {
          "type_code": "ally"
        }
      }
    ],
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 0,
        "subject": "self",
        "set_to_mod": true,
        "token_name": "_avengers_tower"
      }
    ]
  },
  "triggered when a phase of the game ended (player or villain phase)phase_ended": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 0,
        "subject": "self",
        "set_to_mod": true,
        "token_name": "_avengers_tower"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Avengers Tower #21100a

    {
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify specific properties of the card (also see alterants)modify_properties",
        "tags": [
          "Init"
        ],
        "subject": "self",
        "set_properties": {
          "health": 100
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "is_unique",
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Avengers Tower"
            }
          }
        ],
        "alteration": -1
      }
    ]
  },
  "triggers when a card receives damage greater than zerocard_damaged": {
    "event_filters": {
      "target": "self"
    },
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "if": {
                "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",
                "func_params": {
                  "token_name": "damage",
                  "subject": "self"
                },
                "comparison": "ge",
                "comparison_value": 9
              },
              "then": 1,
              "else": 0
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "heal [subjects]. Can be used as a cost, in which case the heal must happen at least partially for the cost to be considered paidheal",
                "subject": "self",
                "amount": 100
              },
              {
                "name": "flip_doublesided_card",
                "subject": "self"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    {
  "special trigger to reveal the side A of main schemesreveal_side_a": {
    "all": {
      "_rules": {
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true,
        "forced": true
      },
      "Balance the Scales": [
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "subject": "tutor",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "src_container": "discard_my_hero",
          "dest_container": "deck_my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "shuffle_container",
          "dest_container": "deck_my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "src_container": [
            "deck_my_hero",
            "discard_my_hero"
          ],
          "subject": "tutor",
          "sort_by": "random",
          "subject_count": "per_tutor",
          "per_tutor": {
            "subject": "tutor",
            "subject_count": "all",
            "src_container": [

              "discard_my_hero"
            ],
            "divider": 2
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

      }
    ]
  }
}

    Combat Training

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "max_per_hero_any": 1
      }
    ]
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject]cards to a specific hero boardmove_to_player_zone",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": 1,
        "selection_type": "equal",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities",
            "filter_max_per_hero": 1
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "attack",
        "filter_same_controller": true,
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities"
          }
        ],
        "alteration": 1
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Corvus Glaive - 1

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "condition_board": {
      "func_name": "returns true if the current activation (attack, scheme, encounter...) matches the passed params. e.g. to check if attack is undefendedcurrent_activation_status",
      "func_params": {
        "undefended": true
      }
    },
    "event_name": "triggers after an enemy attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was stunnedenemy_attack_happened",
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "src_container": "deck_villain",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "subject_count": 1
      },
      {
        "name": "deal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damagedeal_damage",
        "amount": {
          "func_name": "Returns number of boost icons on subjectcount_boost_icons",
          "func_params": {
            "subject": "all_previous"
          }
        },
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Avengers Tower"
            },
            "filter_properties2": {
              "type_code": "environment"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "cannot_leave_play",
        "trigger": "self",
        "alteration": {
          "func_name": "returns remaining damage (health - damage) for subject cardget_remaining_damage",
          "func_params": {
            "subject": "boardseek",
            "filter_state_seek": [
              {
                "filter_properties": {
                  "Name": "Proxima Midnight - 1"
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

      },

        "name": "ask_integer",

      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",

        "subject_count": "retrieve_integer",

          "grid_name": "enemies_my_hero",
          "subject": "index",
          "subject_count": 1,
          "subject_index": "retrieve_integer",
          "src_container": "deck_villain"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": [
      "commit_scheme",
      "enemy_attack"
    ],
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "token_name": "invocation",
        "modification": -1,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "play_area_current_hero_target",
            "filter_properties": {
              "trait_spell": 1,
              "comparison": "ge"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

              }

        },

    Fallen Warrior

    {
  "self_moved_to_board": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "count_cards",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "tutor",
                "src_container": "deck_current_hero_target",
                "subject_count": "all",
                "filter_state_tutor": [
                  {
                    "filter_properties": {
                      "type_code": "ally"
                    }
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
                "subject": "grab_until",
                "src_container": "deck_current_hero_target",
                "dest_container": "discard_current_hero_target",
                "needs_subject": true,
                "filter_state_grab_until": [
                  {
                    "filter_properties": {
                      "type_code": "ally"
                    }
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
                "subject": "index",
                "subject_count": 1,
                "subject_index": "retrieve_integer",
                "src_container": "deck_current_hero_target",
                "tags": [
                  "facedown",
                  "Init"
                ],
                "set_properties": {
                  "type_code": "minion",
                  "shortname": "Undead",
                  "trait_undead": 1,
                  "attack": {
                    "func_name": "get_subject_int_printed_property",
                    "func_params": {
                      "property": "attack",
                      "subject": "current_subject"
                    }
                  },
                  "The Villain schemesscheme": {
                    "func_name": "get_subject_int_printed_property",
                    "func_params": {
                      "property": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
                      "subject": "current_subject"
                    }
                  },
                  "health": {
                    "func_name": "get_subject_int_printed_property",
                    "func_params": {
                      "property": "health",
                      "subject": "current_subject"
                    }
                  }
                }
              },
              {
                "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
                "subject": "previous"
              }
            ]
          }
        ],
        "else": [
          {
            "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
            "subject": "grab_until",
            "src_container": "deck_current_hero_target",
            "dest_container": "discard_current_hero_target",
            "needs_subject": true,
            "filter_state_grab_until": [
              {
                "filter_properties": {
                  "type_code": "ally"
                }
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
            "subject": "self",
            "dest_container": "discard_villain"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

  "self_moved_to_board": {
    "_silent": true,
    "board": [

        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": 4,
        "token_name": "invocation"
      }
    ]
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "_silent": true,
    "trigger": "self",
    "event_filters": {
      "destination_grid": "villain_misc"
    },
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
        "subject": "self",

    "trigger": "self",

    "filter_token_name": "invocation",

        "subject": "my_identity",
        "amount": 4
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "self",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Focused Defense

    {
  "triggered when a phase of the game ended (player or villain phase)phase_ended": {
    "event_filters": {
      "phase": "player"
    },
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "subject_exclude": "host",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "main_scheme"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "card_attached": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "set_active_villain",
        "subject": "host"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    For Justice!

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_form"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
        "amount": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "returns true if this ability was paid for with a specific type of resourcepaid_with_includes",
            "func_params": {
              "mental": 1
            }
          },
          "then": 4,
          "else": 3
        },
        "subject": "target",
        "needs_subject": true,
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_schemes"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Frost Giant

    {
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "replaces some task on the stack with something else (e.g. damage replaced, targets, replaced, etc...)replacement_effect",
        "subject": "current_activation",
        "replacements": {
          "additional_tags": [
            "stun_if_damage"
          ]
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "alter_ego_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
        "cost": {
          "energy": 1,
          "physical": 1
        },
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Gamma Blast

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [

              "func_name": "Returns true if card_name is in playcard_is_in_play",
              "func_params": {
                "card_name": "Gamma"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "attack",
                "subject": "target",
                "amount": 7,
                "filter_state_subject": [
                  {
                    "filter_group": "group_enemies"
                  }
                ],
                "tags": [
                  "overkill"
                ]
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "!card_is_in_play",
              "func_params": {
                "card_name": "Gamma"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "change hero formchange_form",
                "form_name": "Gamma"
              },
              {
                "name": "attack",
                "subject": "target",
                "amount": 7,
                "filter_state_subject": [
                  {
                    "filter_group": "group_enemies"
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Hela - A1

    {
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "The Villain schemesscheme",
        "trigger": "self",
        "per_tutor": {
          "subject": "tutor",
          "src_container": "victory_display",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_tutor": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "type_code": "side_scheme"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "alteration": "per_tutor"
      },
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "attack",
        "trigger": "self",
        "per_tutor": {
          "subject": "tutor",
          "src_container": "victory_display",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_tutor": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "type_code": "side_scheme"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "alteration": "per_tutor"
      },
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "health",
        "trigger": "self",
        "per_tutor": {
          "subject": "tutor",
          "src_container": "victory_display",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_tutor": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "type_code": "side_scheme"
              }
            }
          ],
          "multiplier": 2
        },
        "alteration": "per_tutor",
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true

    ]
  }

        "filter_property_name": "health",
        "trigger": "self",
        "per_tutor": {
          "subject": "tutor",
          "src_container": "victory_display",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_tutor": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "type_code": "side_scheme"
              }
            }
          ],
          "multiplier": 3
        },
        "alteration": "per_tutor",
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Hela's Domain

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
        "subject": "main_scheme",
        "amount": "per_tutor",
        "plus_amount": 1,
        "per_tutor": {
          "subject": "tutor",
          "src_container": "victory_display",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_tutor": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "type_code": "side_scheme"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "adds a script to a target cardadd_script",
        "end_condition": "enemy_activation_finished",
        "subject": "host",
        "script": {
          "interrupt_card_dies": {
            "event_filters": {
              "tags": [
                "attack"
              ]
            },
            "filter_state_trigger": [
              {
                "filter_properties": {
                  "type_code": "ally"
                }
              }
            ],
            "board": [
              {
                "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
                "amount": 2,
                "subject": "main_scheme"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Heroic Intuition

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "max_per_hero_any": 1
      }
    ]
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject]cards to a specific hero boardmove_to_player_zone",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": 1,
        "selection_type": "equal",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities",
            "filter_max_per_hero": 1
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
        "filter_same_controller": true,
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities"
          }
        ],
        "alteration": 1
      }
    ]
  }
}

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": [
      {

        "src_container": "discard_infinity_stone",

      },
      {
        "name": "shuffle_container",
        "dest_container": "deck_infinity_stone"
      },
      {
        "name": "reveal encounter by trying multiple sources, first looking into subjects, then falling back to src_container, and finally into the villain's deckreveal_encounter",
        "src_container": "deck_infinity_stone"
      },
      {
        "name": "draw_boost_card",
        "subject": "host",
        "src_container": "deck_infinity_stone"
      }

    "all": [

        "src_container": "deck_infinity_stone"
      }
    ]
  }

    Infinity Gauntlet

    {
  "extra_decks": [
    {
      "name": "discard_infinity_stone",
      "faceup": true
    },
    {
      "name": "deck_infinity_stone"
    }
  ],
  "extra_rules": [
    {
      "triggers when a card moves to any pile on the board. Additional filters required to understand which pilecard_moved_to_pile": {
        "event_filters": {
          "destination": "discard_villain"
        },
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "environment"
            },
            "filter_properties2": {
              "trait_infinity_stone": 1
            }
          }
        ],
        "all": [
          {
            "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
            "dest_container": "discard_infinity_stone",
            "subject": "trigger"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "special trigger for setup on some cardssetup": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "tutor",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "src_container": [
          "deck_villain"
        ],
        "dest_container": "deck_infinity_stone",
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "environment"
            },
            "filter_properties2": {
              "trait_infinity_stone": 1
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  },
  "self_moved_to_board": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "villain"
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "event_name": [
      "triggers after an enemy attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was stunnedenemy_attack_happened",
      "triggers after an enemy scheme event occured. Scheme needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was confusedenemy_scheme_happened"
    ],
    "trigger": "host",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "initiates a sequence of multiple script calls on multiple calls. Specifically used for Black Panthersequence",
        "sequence_ability": "special",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "trait_infinity_stone": 1
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
        "src_container": "deck_infinity_stone",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Karmic Blast

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "ask_integer",
        "ask_int_min": 0,
        "ask_int_max": 4
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "up_to": true,
        "subject_count": "retrieve_integer",
        "src_container": "deck",
        "dest_container": "discard"
      },
      {
        "name": "attack",
        "subject": "target",
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_enemies"
          }
        ],
        "amount": {
          "func_name": "count_different_aspects",
          "func_params": {
            "subject": "previous"
          }
        },
        "plus_amount": 4
      }
    ]
  }
}

      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "villain"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Madness on Midgard

    {
  "hinder": {
    "__amount__": 1,
    "__each_player__": true
  },
  "card_defeated": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "reveal encounter by trying multiple sources, first looking into subjects, then falling back to src_container, and finally into the villain's deckreveal_encounter",
        "src_container": "deck_infinity_stone"
      },
      {
        "name": "swap_villain",
        "options": {
          "copy_damage": true
        },
        "src_container": "set_aside",
        "subject": "tutor",
        "sort_by": "random",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "villain"
            },
            "filter_properties2": {
              "shortname": "Loki"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Magic Attack

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ],
        "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints": [
          {
            "func_name": "returns true if your identity has the traitidentity_has_trait",
            "func_params": {
              "trait": "mystic"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "ask_integer",
        "ask_int_min": 0,
        "ask_int_max": 5
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "up_to": true,
        "subject_count": "retrieve_integer",
        "src_container": "deck",
        "dest_container": "discard"
      },
      {
        "name": "attack",
        "subject": "target",
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_enemies"
          }
        ],
        "amount": {
          "func_name": "count_cards",
          "func_params": {
            "subject": "previous"
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Make the Call

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "adds a script to a target cardadd_script",
        "end_condition": "before_card_moved_to_board",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "tutor",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "src_container": "any_discard",
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_allies"
          }
        ],
        "script": {
          "manual": {
            "pile": [
              {
                "name": "trigger to initiate the card's cost paymentpay_regular_cost",
                "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
                "cost": "card_cost"
              },
              {
                "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
                "subject": "self"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "also see deal_damagereceive_damage",
    "event_filters": {
      "tags": [
        "attack"
      ]
    },
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
        "cost": {
          "physical": 1
        },
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "replaces some task on the stack with something else (e.g. damage replaced, targets, replaced, etc...)replacement_effect",
        "subject": "interrupted_event",

          "additional_tags": [
            "piercing",
            "ranged"
          ]
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Mass Attack

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": 3,
        "selection_type": "equal",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "allies_my_hero",
            "filter_shares_trait_with_identity": true,
            "filter_is_exhausted": false
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "attack",
        "subject": "target",
        "amount": {
          "func_name": "get_subject_int_property",
          "func_params": {
            "property": "attack",
            "subject": "previous"
          }
        },
        "plus_amount": {
          "func_name": "get_subject_int_property",
          "func_params": {
            "property": "attack",
            "subject": "my_hero"
          }
        },
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_enemies"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Master of Illusions

    {
  "self_moved_to_board": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "Loki"
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "also see deal_damagereceive_damage",
    "event_filters": {
      "target": "host",
      "tags": [
        "attack"
      ]
    },
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "src_container": "deck_villain",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain"
      },
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "get_subject_int_property",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "previous",
                "property": "type_code",
                "property_value": "treachery"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "prevents damage (also see replacement_effect)prevent",
                "amount": "all",
                "subject": "interrupted_event"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "event_prevented": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "self",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain"
      }
    ]
  }
}

        "subject": "self",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain"
      }

        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "self",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    No Place for the Living

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true,
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true
      },
      "Damage": [
        {
          "name": "deal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damagedeal_damage",
          "subject": "my_identity",
          "amount": "per_boardseek",
          "per_boardseek": {
            "subject": "boardseek",
            "subject_count": "all",
            "filter_state_seek": [
              {
                "filter_group": "group_upgrade_support_my_hero"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      ],
      "Discard upgrade": [
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": 1,
          "sort_by": "function",
          "sort_name": "get_subject_int_printed_property",
          "func_params": {
            "property": "cost"
          },
          "sort_descending": true,
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_group": "group_upgrade_support_my_hero"
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

            }
          }
        ]

      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "set_aside",
        "subject": "tutor",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "src_container": "deck_villain",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Gjallerbru"
            }
          },
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Skurge"
            }
          },
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Hall of Nastrond"
            }
          },
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Nidhogg"
            }
          }

  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "card_dies",
    "filter_state_trigger": [
      {
        "filter_properties": {
          "shortname": "Hela"
        }
      }
    ],
    "condition_board": {
      "func_name": "count_attachments",
      "func_params": {
        "subject": "self",
        "filter_state_attachment": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "shortname": "Odin"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "prevents damage (also see replacement_effect)prevent",
        "subject": "interrupted_event"
      },
      {
        "name": "heal [subjects]. Can be used as a cost, in which case the heal must happen at least partially for the cost to be considered paidheal",
        "subject": "trigger",
        "amount": 100
      },
      {
        "name": "return_attachments_to",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "subject": "trigger"
      },
      {
        "name": "swap_villain",
        "subject": "trigger_flip_side"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Open the Bifrost

    {
  "hinder": {
    "__amount__": 1,
    "__each_player__": true
  },

    Photon

    {
  "on_load": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "modify specific properties of the card (also see alterants)modify_properties",
        "subject": "self",
        "set_properties": {
          "form_family": "energy"
        },
        "tags": [
          "Init"
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "self_moved_to_board": {
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_form"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "removes threat from [subject] schemes. Also see thwart.remove_threat",
        "subject": "target",
        "amount": 1,
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_schemes"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Spectrum"
            }
          }
        ],
        "alteration": 2
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Photon Speed

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "Returns true if card_name is in playcard_is_in_play",
              "func_params": {
                "card_name": "Photon"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
                "subject": "target",
                "amount": 4,
                "filter_state_subject": [
                  {
                    "filter_group": "group_schemes"
                  }
                ],
                "tags": [
                  "bypass_crisis"
                ]
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "!card_is_in_play",
              "func_params": {
                "card_name": "Photon"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "change hero formchange_form",
                "form_name": "Photon"
              },
              {
                "name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
                "subject": "target",
                "amount": 4,
                "filter_state_subject": [
                  {
                    "filter_group": "group_schemes"
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Proxima Midnight - 1

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": [
      "enemy_attack"
    ],
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true
      },
      "+2 ATK": [
        {
          "name": "adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)temporary_effect",
          "end_condition": "enemy_activation_finished",
          "subject": "self",
          "effect": {
            "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
              "all": [
                {
                  "filter_task": "get_property",
                  "filter_property_name": "attack",
                  "filter_state_trigger": [
                    {
                      "filter_properties": {
                        "shortname": "Proxima Midnight"
                      }
                    }
                  ],
                  "alteration": 2
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      ],
      "1 Damage on Avengers Tower": [
        {
          "name": "deal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damagedeal_damage",
          "amount": 1,
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "Name": "Avengers Tower"
              },
              "filter_properties2": {
                "type_code": "environment"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "cannot_leave_play",
        "trigger": "self",
        "alteration": {
          "func_name": "returns remaining damage (health - damage) for subject cardget_remaining_damage",
          "func_params": {
            "subject": "boardseek",
            "filter_state_seek": [
              {
                "filter_properties": {
                  "Name": "Corvus Glaive - 1"
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}
