    Proxima's Spear

    {
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "Proxima Midnight"
      }
    ]
  },
  "attacks_gain": {
    "__trigger__": "host",
    "__tags__": "overkill\",\"piercing"
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
        "cost": {
          "energy": 1,
          "mental": 1
        },
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "deal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damagedeal_damage",
        "amount": 1,
        "subject": "my_hero",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Pulsar

    {
  "on_load": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "modify specific properties of the card (also see alterants)modify_properties",
        "subject": "self",
        "set_properties": {
          "form_family": "energy"
        },
        "tags": [
          "Init"
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "self_moved_to_board": {
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_form"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "heal [subjects]. Can be used as a cost, in which case the heal must happen at least partially for the cost to be considered paidheal",
        "amount": 1,
        "subject": "my_hero"
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "defense",
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Spectrum"
            }
          }
        ],
        "alteration": 2
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Pulsar Shield

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "enemy_attack_damage",
    "event_filters": {
      "target": "my_hero"
    },
    "is_optional_hand": true,
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_interrupt"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "set_defender",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "my_hero",
        "_comments": "set_defender here has a double role, 1) sets my_hero as a defender if not already the case, 2) because it is a cost, it will fail if there is already a different defender chosen"
      },
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "Returns true if card_name is in playcard_is_in_play",
              "func_params": {
                "card_name": "Pulsar"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "ready a specific card (also see exhaust)ready_card",
                "subject": "my_hero"
              },
              {
                "name": "adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)temporary_effect",
                "end_condition": "triggered when a phase of the game ended (player or villain phase)phase_ended",
                "subject": "my_hero",
                "effect": {
                  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
                    "all": [
                      {
                        "filter_task": "get_property",
                        "filter_property_name": "retaliate",
                        "filter_state_trigger": [
                          {
                            "filter_properties": {
                              "shortname": "Spectrum"
                            }
                          }
                        ],
                        "alteration": 1
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                }
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "!card_is_in_play",
              "func_params": {
                "card_name": "Pulsar"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "change hero formchange_form",
                "form_name": "Pulsar"
              },
              {
                "name": "ready a specific card (also see exhaust)ready_card",
                "subject": "my_hero"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

      }

      }

    Radioactive Man

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "event_name": [
      "triggers after an enemy attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was stunnedenemy_attack_happened",
      "triggers after an enemy scheme event occured. Scheme needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was confusedenemy_scheme_happened"
    ],
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "deal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damagedeal_damage",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "amount": 1,
        "subject_count": "all",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_friendly_my_hero"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "deal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damagedeal_damage",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "amount": 1,
        "subject_count": "all",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_friendly_my_hero"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Regeneration Cycle

    {
  "a shortcut macro to give an obligation to its matching player. See _macros.jsongive_obligation": {
    "__to__": "Adam Warlock"
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true
      },
      "Flip then Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity",
          "_comments": "we need to exhaust before changing form here due to a bug"
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "alter_ego_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Flip then Add threat": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard_villain",
          "subject": "self"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "subject": "tutor",
          "up_to": true,
          "subject_count": 5,
          "src_container": "deck",
          "dest_container": "discard",
          "needs_subject": true
        },
        {
          "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
          "subject": "main_scheme",
          "amount": {
            "func_name": "count_different_aspects",
            "func_params": {
              "subject": "previous"
            }
          }
        }
      ],
      "Add threat": [
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard_villain",
          "subject": "self"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "subject": "tutor",
          "up_to": true,
          "subject_count": 5,
          "src_container": "deck",
          "dest_container": "discard",
          "needs_subject": true
        },
        {
          "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
          "subject": "main_scheme",
          "amount": {
            "func_name": "count_different_aspects",
            "func_params": {
              "subject": "previous"
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

          "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",

            "physical": 2
          },

        },

          ]

            "physical": 3
          },

    ]

  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "cannot_attack",
        "trigger": "host",
        "alteration": 1
      },
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "cannot_play",
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "trait_attack": 1,
              "comparison": "ge"
            },
            "filter_properties2": {
              "type_code": "event"
            },
            "filter_same_controller": true
          }
        ],
        "alteration": 1
      }
    ]
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "alter_ego_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
        "cost": {
          "mental": 1,
          "energy": 1
        },
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    The Armies of Thanos

    {
  "associated_villain": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "does nothing, but used for example to ensure some conditioi is met, as a costnop",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "shortname": "Corvus Glaive"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "_comments": "no use of reveal_side_a here because this is spawned by another card (Under Siege)",
  "reveal": {
    "all": {
      "_rules": {
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true,
        "forced": true
      },
      "Reveal": [
        {
          "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
          "subject": "tutor",
          "src_container": "deck_villain",
          "filter_state_tutor": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "Name": "Avengers Tower"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
          "subject": "tutor",
          "grid_name": "enemies_my_hero",
          "src_container": "deck_villain",
          "filter_state_tutor": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "Name": "Black Order Besieger"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "owner of the script will become the host of the subjects. Can be used to steal cards for examplehost_card",
          "subject": "tutor",
          "src_container": [
            "deck_villain",
            "set_aside"
          ],
          "filter_state_tutor": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "Name": "Focused Defense"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "stage_completed",
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "prevents damage (also see replacement_effect)prevent",
        "subject": "interrupted_event"
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 0,
        "set_to_mod": true,
        "token_name": "threat",
        "subject": "self"
      },
      {
        "name": "deal an encounter to current herodeal_encounter",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {

      "triggers after an enemy attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was stunnedenemy_attack_happened",

        "forced": true
      },
      "Reveal Spell": [
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",

          "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",

    The Queen of Hel

    {
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in alter ego formreveal_alter_ego": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "subject enemy (typically the villain) starts a scheme actionenemy_schemes",
        "subject": "villain"
      },
      {
        "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
        "amount": 1,
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "side_scheme"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in hero formreveal_hero": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "Triggers an attack of the villain against current herovillain_attacks_you"
      },
      {
        "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
        "amount": 1,
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "side_scheme"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,

        ],
        "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints": [
          {

      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "up_to": true,
        "subject_count": "retrieve_integer",

      },
      {
        "name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",

          }
        ],

  }

    Dum Dum Dugan

    {
  "interrupt_attack": {
    "event_filters": {
      "tags": [
        "basic power"
      ]
    },
    "trigger": "self",
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": 3,
        "selection_type": "max",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "play_area_my_hero",
            "filter_is_exhausted": false,
            "filter_properties": {
              "trait_s.h.i.e.l.d": 1,
              "comparison": "ge"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)temporary_effect",
        "end_condition": "triggers after attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if character was stunnedattack_happened",
        "subject": "self",
        "effect": {
          "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
            "all": [
              {
                "filter_task": "get_property",
                "filter_property_name": "attack",
                "filter_state_trigger": [
                  {
                    "filter_card_name": "Dum Dum Dugan"
                  }
                ],
                "alteration": "count_previous_subjects"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "interrupt_thwart": {
    "event_filters": {
      "tags": [
        "basic power"
      ]
    },
    "trigger": "self",
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": 3,
        "selection_type": "max",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "play_area_my_hero",
            "filter_is_exhausted": false,
            "filter_properties": {
              "trait_s.h.i.e.l.d": 1,
              "comparison": "ge"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)temporary_effect",
        "end_condition": "thwart_happened",
        "subject": "self",
        "effect": {
          "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
            "all": [
              {
                "filter_task": "get_property",
                "filter_property_name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
                "filter_state_trigger": [
                  {
                    "filter_card_name": "Dum Dum Dugan"
                  }
                ],
                "alteration": "count_previous_subjects"
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Field Agent

    {
  "special macro to implement the 'uses' keyworduses": {
    "__name__": "backup",
    "__amount__": 3
  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "also see deal_damagereceive_damage",
    "event_filters": {
      "tags": [
        "consequential_damage"
      ]
    },
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "filter_state_trigger": [
      {
        "filter_properties": {
          "type_code": "ally"
        },
        "filter_properties2": {
          "trait_s.h.i.e.l.d": 1,
          "comparison": "ge"
        }
      }
    ],
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_interrupt"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "self",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": -1,
        "token_name": "backup",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "prevents damage (also see replacement_effect)prevent",
        "amount": 1,
        "subject": "interrupted_event"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Ganke Lee

    {
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "action_ability"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "self"
      },
      {
        "name": "the owner of [subject]cards draws cardsdraw_cards",
        "amount": 1
      },
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "is_hero_form",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "my_hero"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
                "dest_container": "discard",
                "src_container": "hand",
                "subject": "tutor",
                "subject_count": "all",
                "selection_count": 1,
                "selection_type": "equal",
                "needs_selection": true
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints": [
          {
            "func_name": "has_trait",
            "func_params": {
              "subject": "boardseek",
              "subject_count": "all",
              "filter_state_seek": [
                {
                  "filter_group": "play_area_my_hero"
                }
              ],
              "trait": "web-warrior"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]

  "interrupt_card_leaves_play": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "hand",
        "src_container": "deck",
        "subject": "tutor",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": 1,
        "selection_type": "max",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "faction_code": "hero"
            },
            "filter_properties2": {
              "type_code": "event"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "shuffle_container",
        "src_container": "deck"
      }
    ]
  }
}

  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {

      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "self",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": 1,
        "set_to_mod": true,
        "token_name": "_liaison"
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "cost",
        "filter_state_trigger": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "trait_s.h.i.e.l.d": 1,
              "comparison": "ge"
            }
          }
        ],
        "alteration": "per_token_self",
        "per_token_self": {
          "token_name": "_liaison",
          "is_inverted": true
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "triggers when a card is played by a player.card_played": {
    "trigger": "another",
    "filter_state_trigger": [
      {
        "filter_properties": {
          "trait_s.h.i.e.l.d": 1,
          "comparison": "ge"
        }
      }
    ],
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 0,
        "subject": "self",
        "set_to_mod": true,
        "token_name": "_liaison"
      }
    ]
  },
  "triggered when a phase of the game ended (player or villain phase)phase_ended": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 0,
        "subject": "self",
        "set_to_mod": true,
        "token_name": "_liaison"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    {
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "alter_ego_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "self"
      },
      {
        "name": "removes threat from [subject] schemes. Also see thwart.remove_threat",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "sort_by": "function",
        "sort_name": "get_subject_int_property",
        "func_params": {
          "property": "threat"
        },
        "sort_descending": false,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_schemes"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }

    Keeping Secrets

    {
  "a shortcut macro to give an obligation to its matching player. See _macros.jsongive_obligation": {
    "__to__": "Miles Morales"
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true
      },
      "Flip then Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity",
          "_comments": "we need to exhaust before changing form here due to a bug"
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "alter_ego_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Flip then Discard": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard",
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "Name": "Ganke Lee"
              }
            },
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "Name": "Jefferson Davis"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge",
          "amount": {
            "if": {
              "func_name": "count_cards",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "previous"
              }
            },
            "then": 0,
            "else": 1
          }
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard_villain",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Discard": [
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard",
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "Name": "Ganke Lee"
              }
            },
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "Name": "Jefferson Davis"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge",
          "amount": {
            "if": {
              "func_name": "count_cards",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "previous"
              }
            }
          },
          "then": 0,
          "else": 1
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard_villain",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

      "after": "alter_ego"
    },
    "trigger": "self",
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "shullfes subject cards into dest_containershuffle_card_into_container",
        "dest_container": "deck",
        "src_container": "discard",
        "subject": "tutor",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": 1,
        "selection_type": "max",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "faction_code": "hero"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }

    {
  "response_basic_attack_happened": {
    "trigger": "my_hero",
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_interrupt"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "self",
        "dest_container": "discard"
      },
      {
        "name": "initiates a sequence of multiple script calls on multiple calls. Specifically used for Black Panthersequence",
        "sequence_ability": "venom_blast",
        "subject": "my_hero"
      }
    ]
  },
  "response_basic_thwart_happened": {
    "trigger": "my_hero",
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_interrupt"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "self",
        "dest_container": "discard"
      },
      {
        "name": "initiates a sequence of multiple script calls on multiple calls. Specifically used for Black Panthersequence",
        "sequence_ability": "venom_blast",
        "subject": "my_hero"
      }
    ]
  }
}

      {

  }

    {
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in alter ego formreveal_alter_ego": {

  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in hero formreveal_hero": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)temporary_effect",
        "end_condition": "enemy_activation_finished",
        "subject": "self",
        "effect": {
          "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
            "all": [
              {
                "filter_task": "get_property",
                "filter_property_name": "attack",
                "filter_state_trigger": [
                  {
                    "filter_properties": {
                      "shortname": "Sandman"
                    }
                  }
                ],
                "alteration": 1
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "Triggers an attack of the villain against current herovillain_attacks_you"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Sand Storm

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "City Streets",
                "token_name": "sand"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "indirect_damage",
                "amount": {
                  "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",
                  "func_params": {
                    "subject": "City Streets",
                    "token_name": "sand"
                  }
                },
                "filter_state_seek": [
                  {
                    "filter_group": "group_friendly"
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }
        ],
        "else": [
          {
            "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
            "modification": 3,
            "subject": "City Streets",
            "token_name": "sand"
          },
          {
            "name": "shullfes subject cards into dest_containershuffle_card_into_container",
            "subject": "self"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    {
  "on_load": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "modify specific properties of the card (also see alterants)modify_properties",
        "subject": "self",
        "set_properties": {
          "cost": {
            "energy": 1,
            "mental": 1,
            "physical": 1
          }
        },
        "tags": [
          "Init"
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "event_name": [
      "triggers after attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if character was stunnedattack_happened",
      "thwart_happened"
    ],
    "trigger": "self",
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "ready a specific card (also see exhaust)ready_card",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "target",
        "subject_exclude": "self",
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_is_exhausted": true,
            "filter_group": "group_characters",
            "filter_properties": {
              "trait_web-warrior": 1,
              "comparison": "ge"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "action_ability"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "self",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": -1,
        "token_name": "snoop",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },

        "amount": 1,
        "subject": "target",

  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",

        "tags": [

            "filter_group": "group_schemes"

        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": -1,
        "token_name": "web",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "adds resources based on specific computationsadd_resource",
        "amount": 1,
        "resource_name": "wild"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Web-Shot

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "attack",
        "amount": 4,
        "subject": "target",
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_enemies"
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "returns true if this ability was paid for with a specific type of resourcepaid_with_includes",
              "func_params": {
                "energy": 1
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "initiates a sequence of multiple script calls on multiple calls. Specifically used for Black Panthersequence",
                "sequence_ability": "venom_blast",
                "subject": "my_hero"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",

        "tags": [
          "alter_ego_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "heal [subjects]. Can be used as a cost, in which case the heal must happen at least partially for the cost to be considered paidheal",

        "amount": 3,
        "subject": "boardseek",

          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "shortname": "Miles Morales"
            }
          },

            "filter_properties": {
              "subname": "Miles Morales"

    trors

    Abandoned Facility

    {
  "_surge": {},
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "condition_board": {
      "func_name": "returns true if the current activation (attack, scheme, encounter...) matches the passed params. e.g. to check if attack is undefendedcurrent_activation_status",
      "func_params": {
        "undefended": true
      }
    },
    "event_name": "triggers after an enemy attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was stunnedenemy_attack_happened",
    "trigger": "villain",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard_current_hero_target",
        "src_container": "hand_current_hero_target",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",
            "func_params": {
              "token_name": "delay",
              "subject": "main_scheme"
            },
            "comparison": "ge",
            "comparison_value": 5
          },
          "then": 2,
          "else": 1
        },
        "selection_type": "min",
        "selection_what_to_count": "get_resource_value_as_int",
        "needs_selection": true
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Absorbing Man - 1

    {
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "trait_*",
        "trigger": "self",
        "per_boardseek": {
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_has_requested_property": true,
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "type_code": "environment"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "alteration": "per_boardseek"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Absorbing Man - 2

    {
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "trait_*",
        "trigger": "self",
        "per_boardseek": {
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_has_requested_property": true,
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "type_code": "environment"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "alteration": "per_boardseek"
      }
    ]
  },
  "reveal": {
    "all": [
      {
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "name": "deal an encounter to current herodeal_encounter",
        "immediate_reveal": true,
        "subject": "tutor",
        "src_container": [
          "deck_villain",
          "discard_villain"
        ],
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Super Absorbing Power"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true,
        "name": "deal an encounter to current herodeal_encounter",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Absorbing Man - 3

    {
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "trait_*",
        "trigger": "self",
        "per_boardseek": {
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_has_requested_property": true,
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "type_code": "environment"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "alteration": "per_boardseek"
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "event_name": [
      "triggers after an enemy attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was stunnedenemy_attack_happened",
      "triggers after an enemy scheme event occured. Scheme needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was confusedenemy_scheme_happened"
    ],
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "has_trait",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "villain",
                "trait": [
                  "ice",
                  "stone"
                ],
                "and_or": "or"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
                "subject": "main_scheme",
                "amount": 1
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "has_trait",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "villain",
                "trait": [
                  "metal",
                  "wood"
                ],
                "and_or": "or"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "indirect_damage",
                "filter_state_seek": [
                  {
                    "filter_group": "group_friendly_current_hero_target"
                  }
                ],
                "amount": 1
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {

        "filter_same_controller": true,

          "token_name": "_avengers_tower",

            },

              "type_code": "ally"
            }

        ]

    "_comments": "TODO needs to account for allies type"
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "action_ability"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "self",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": 1,
        "token_name": "_avengers_tower"
      }
    ]
  },
  "triggers when a card is played by a player.card_played": {
    "trigger": "another",
    "filter_state_trigger": [
      {
        "filter_properties": {
          "trait_avenger": 1
        },
        "filter_properties2": {
          "type_code": "ally"
        }
      }
    ],
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 0,
        "subject": "self",
        "set_to_mod": true,
        "token_name": "_avengers_tower"
      }
    ]
  },
  "triggered when a phase of the game ended (player or villain phase)phase_ended": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 0,
        "subject": "self",
        "set_to_mod": true,
        "token_name": "_avengers_tower"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    {
  "special macro that creates a token which can limit some specific actions to once per round. see _macros.jsononce_per_round": {
    "__name__": "_weapon_of_choice"
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": {
      "Weapon of Choice": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "action_ability"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
          "subject": "self",
          "modification": -1,
          "token_name": "_weapon_of_choice",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
        },
        {
          "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
          "cost": {
            "unc": 1
          },
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "subject": "tutor",
          "src_container": [
            "deck",
            "discard"
          ],
          "dest_container": "hand",
          "filter_state_tutor": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "Name": "Hawkeye's Bow"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

    Combat Knife

    {
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "villain"
      }
    ]
  },
  "attacks_gain": {
    "__trigger__": "host",
    "__tags__": "piercing"
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
        "cost": {
          "physical": 1,
          "mental": 1
        },
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Concussion Grenade

    {
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in alter ego formreveal_alter_ego": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
        "subject": "main_scheme",
        "amount": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",
            "func_params": {
              "token_name": [
                "confused"
              ],
              "subject": "my_hero"
            }
          },
          "then": 2,
          "else": 1
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 1,
        "token_name": "confused",
        "subject": "my_identity"
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in hero formreveal_hero": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "deal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damagedeal_damage",
        "subject": "my_hero",
        "amount": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",
            "func_params": {
              "token_name": [
                "stunned"
              ],
              "subject": "my_hero"
            }
          },
          "then": 2,
          "else": 1
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 1,
        "token_name": "stunned",
        "subject": "my_hero"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Contaminant Immunity

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "heal [subjects]. Can be used as a cost, in which case the heal must happen at least partially for the cost to be considered paidheal",
        "amount": 3,
        "subject": "my_hero"
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 1,
        "token_name": "tough",
        "subject": "my_hero"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Cornered Staff

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "src_container": "deck_villain",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true
      },
      {
        "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
        "amount": {
          "func_name": "Returns number of boost icons on subjectcount_boost_icons",
          "func_params": {
            "subject": "all_previous"
          }
        },
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Criminal Past

    {
  "a shortcut macro to give an obligation to its matching player. See _macros.jsongive_obligation": {
    "__to__": "Clint Barton"
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": {
      "_rules": {
        "forced": true
      },
      "Flip then Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity",
          "_comments": "we need to exhaust before changing form here due to a bug"
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Remove from the game": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "alter_ego_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "subject": "my_identity"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "set_aside",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Flip then Discard Bow": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "hero_form"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "change hero formchange_form",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard",
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "Name": "Hawkeye's Bow"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard_villain",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],
      "Discard Bow": [
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard",
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "Name": "Hawkeye's Bow"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
          "dest_container": "discard_villain",
          "subject": "self"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

    Crossbones - 1

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "also see deal_damagereceive_damage",
    "trigger": "self",
    "event_filters": {
      "tags": [
        "attack"
      ]
    },
    "condition_board": {
      "func_name": "count_attachments",
      "func_params": {
        "subject": "self",
        "filter_state_attachment": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "comparison": "gt",
              "trait_weapon": 0
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "replaces some task on the stack with something else (e.g. damage replaced, targets, replaced, etc...)replacement_effect",
        "subject": "interrupted_event",
        "replacements": {
          "additional_tags": [
            "piercing"
          ]
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Crossbones' Machine Gun

    {
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "villain"
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": "per_boardseek",
        "per_boardseek": {
          "subject": "boardseek",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "filter_state_seek": [
            {
              "filter_group": "group_identities"
            }
          ],
          "multiplier": 2
        },
        "token_name": "ammo"
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "triggers when enemy initiates attackenemy_initiates_attack",
    "trigger": "host",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "subject": "self",
        "modification": -1,
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "token_name": "ammo"
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "src_container": "deck_villain",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain"
      },
      {
        "name": "indirect_damage",
        "amount": {
          "func_name": "Returns number of boost icons on subjectcount_boost_icons",
          "func_params": {
            "subject": "previous"
          }
        },
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_friendly_current_hero_target"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "card_token_modified": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "filter_count": 0,
    "filter_token_name": "ammo",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "self",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Defensive Programming

    {
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "sort_by": "function",
        "sort_name": "returns remaining damage (health - damage) for subject cardget_remaining_damage",
        "sort_descending": true,
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "minion"
            },
            "filter_max_per_host": 1
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "self",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true
      },
      {
        "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge",
        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "health",
        "trigger": "host",
        "alteration": 2
      },
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "guard",
        "trigger": "host",
        "alteration": 1
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Dense Forest

    {
  "_surge": {},
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "condition_board": {
      "func_name": "returns true if the current activation (attack, scheme, encounter...) matches the passed params. e.g. to check if attack is undefendedcurrent_activation_status",
      "func_params": {
        "undefended": true
      }
    },
    "event_name": "triggers after an enemy attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was stunnedenemy_attack_happened",
    "trigger": "villain",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "indirect_damage",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_friendly_current_hero_target"
          }
        ],
        "amount": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",
            "func_params": {
              "token_name": "delay",
              "subject": "main_scheme"
            },
            "comparison": "ge",
            "comparison_value": 5
          },
          "then": 2,
          "else": 1
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

        "filter_property_name": "retaliate",
        "trigger": "host",
        "alteration": 1
      }
    ]
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
        "cost": {
          "mental": 1,
          "energy": 1
        },
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Goliath - Bill Foster

    {
  "special macro that creates a token which can limit some specific actions to once per round. see _macros.jsononce_per_round": {
    "__name__": "__attack_boost"
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": {
      "+4 ATK": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "action_ability"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
          "modification": -1,
          "subject": "self",
          "token_name": "__attack_boost",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
        },
        {
          "name": "adds a script to a target cardadd_script",
          "end_condition": "triggered when a round ends. Also see phase_endedround_ended",
          "subject": "self",
          "script": {
            "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
              "board": [
                {
                  "filter_task": "get_property",
                  "filter_property_name": "attack",
                  "trigger": "self",
                  "alteration": 4
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        },
        {
          "name": "adds a script to a target cardadd_script",
          "end_condition": "triggered when a round ends. Also see phase_endedround_ended",
          "subject": "self",
          "script": {
            "triggered when a phase of the game ended (player or villain phase)phase_ended": {
              "board": [
                {
                  "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
                  "subject": "self",
                  "dest_container": "discard"
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
