    {
  "macro for the quickstrike keyword, starts an automated attackquickstrike": {},
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_form"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "Triggers an attack of the villain against current herovillain_attacks_you",
        "tags": [
          "no_boost"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Hydra Patrol

    {
  "card_defeated": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "all": {
      "_rules": {
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true,
        "forced": true
      },
      "Patrol": [
        {
          "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
          "subject": "tutor",
          "src_container": [
            "deck_villain",
            "discard_villain"
          ],
          "subject_count": "all",
          "selection_count": 1,
          "selection_type": "equal",
          "needs_selection": true,
          "filter_state_tutor": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "trait_hydra": 1
              },
              "filter_properties2": {
                "type_code": "minion"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "shuffle_container",
          "dest_container": "deck_villain"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

    Hydra Prison

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": {
      "_rules": {
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true,
        "forced": true
      },
      "Capture": [
        {
          "name": "owner of the script will become the host of the subjects. Can be used to steal cards for examplehost_card",
          "tags": [
            "facedown"
          ],
          "src_container": [
            "hand",
            "deck",
            "discard"
          ],
          "subject": "tutor",
          "subject_count": "all",
          "selection_count": 1,
          "needs_selection": true,
          "filter_state_tutor": [
            {
              "filter_properties": {
                "type_code": "ally"
              },
              "filter_properties2": {
                "faction_code": "hero"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
          "subject": "self",
          "amount": {
            "func_name": "get_subject_int_printed_property",
            "func_params": {
              "subject": "previous",
              "property": "cost"
            }
          }
        },
        {
          "name": "shuffle_container",
          "dest_container": "deck"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "card_dies",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "returns attachments of the script's owner to their respective ownersreturn_attachments_to_owner",
        "dest_container": "hand",
        "tags": [
          "facedown"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "trigger": "self"
  },
  "card_defeated": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "set_aside",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Hydra Regular

    {
  "incite": {
    "__amount__": 1
  }
}

    Hydra Reinforcements

    {
  "card_defeated": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "subject": "target",
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "trait_elite": 0
            },
            "filter_group": "group_enemies_my_hero"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Hydra Sidearm

    {
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "villain"
      }
    ]
  },
  "attacks_gain": {
    "__trigger__": "host",
    "__tags__": "ranged"
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
        "cost": {
          "physical": 1,
          "mental": 1
        },
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "card_dies",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "deal an encounter to current herodeal_encounter",
        "subject": "my_hero"
      }
    ],
    "trigger": "self"
  }
}

    Icy Grip

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 1,
        "token_name": "stunned",
        "subject": "my_identity"
      },
      {
        "name": "indirect_damage",
        "amount": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "has_trait",
            "func_params": {
              "subject": "villain",
              "trait": "ice"
            }
          },
          "then": 2,
          "else": 0
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "has_trait",
            "func_params": {
              "subject": "villain",
              "trait": "ice"
            }
          },
          "then": 1,
          "else": 0
        },
        "token_name": "tough",
        "subject": "villain"
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "has_trait",
            "func_params": {
              "subject": "villain",
              "trait": "metal"
            }
          },
          "then": 1,
          "else": 0
        },
        "token_name": "tough",
        "subject": "villain"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Inconspicuous

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart",
        "amount": 1,
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": 3,
        "selection_type": "as_much_as_possible",
        "selection_what_to_count": "removes threat from [subject] schemes. Also see thwart.remove_threat",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_schemes"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Jessica Drew

    {
  "special macro that creates a token which can limit some specific actions to once per round. see _macros.jsononce_per_round": {
    "__name__": "_peek"
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": {
      "Peek": [
        {
          "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
          "tags": [
            "action_ability"
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
          "modification": -1,
          "subject": "self",
          "token_name": "_peek",
          "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
        },
        {
          "name": "view_card",
          "subject": "target",
          "target_include_piles": true,
          "filter_state_subject": [
            {
              "filter_faceup": false
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

    Mimicry

    {
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in alter ego formreveal_alter_ego": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "up_to": true,
        "subject_count": 5,
        "src_container": "deck",
        "dest_container": "discard"
      },
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "has_trait",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "previous",
                "trait": "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "subject enemy (typically the villain) starts a scheme actionenemy_schemes",
                "subject": "villain"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in hero formreveal_hero": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "up_to": true,
        "subject_count": 5,
        "src_container": "deck",
        "dest_container": "discard"
      },
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "has_trait",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "previous",
                "trait": "attack"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "Triggers an attack of the villain against current herovillain_attacks_you"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    {
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",

        "sort_by": "function",
        "sort_name": "returns remaining damage (health - damage) for subject cardget_remaining_damage",

        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,

      }

  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "health",
        "trigger": "host",
        "alteration": 2
      }
    ]
  }
}

        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",

        "token_name": "delay",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "subject_exclude": "trigger",
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "environment"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "filter_state_trigger": [
      {
        "filter_properties": {
          "type_code": "environment"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger for setup on some cardssetup": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "grab_until",
        "src_container": "deck_villain",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "filter_state_grab_until": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "environment"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "subject_index": "retrieve_integer",
        "src_container": "deck_villain"
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "tutor",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "src_container": "discard_villain",
        "dest_container": "deck_villain"
      },
      {
        "name": "shuffle_container",
        "dest_container": "deck_villain"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Omni-Morph Duplication

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "has_trait",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "villain",
                "trait": "ice"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
                "subject": "my_hero"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "has_trait",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "villain",
                "trait": "metal"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
                "modification": 1,
                "token_name": "tough",
                "subject": "villain"
              },
              {
                "name": "heal [subjects]. Can be used as a cost, in which case the heal must happen at least partially for the cost to be considered paidheal",
                "amount": 1,
                "subject": "villain"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "has_trait",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "villain",
                "trait": "stone"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "draw_boost_card",
                "subject": "villain"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "has_trait",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "villain",
                "trait": "wood"
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
                "dest_container": "discard",
                "src_container": "hand",
                "subject": "index",
                "subject_count": 1,
                "subject_index": "random"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Pain Inhibitors

    {
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "sort_by": "function",
        "sort_name": "returns remaining damage (health - damage) for subject cardget_remaining_damage",
        "sort_descending": true,
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "minion"
            },
            "filter_max_per_host": 1
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "self",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true
      },
      {
        "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge",
        "a part of the script that will explicitly be executed if the cost cannot be paidis_else": true
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "health",
        "trigger": "host",
        "alteration": 2
      },
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "retaliate",
        "trigger": "host",
        "alteration": 1
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Press the Advantage

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",

        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "attack",
        "subject": "target",
        "amount": 2,
        "needs_subject": true,
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_enemies"
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "the owner of [subject]cards draws cardsdraw_cards",
        "amount": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",
            "func_params": {
              "token_name": [
                "stunned",
                "confused"
              ],
              "subject": "previous"
            }
          },
          "then": 1,
          "else": 0
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

        {
          "name": "deal an encounter to current herodeal_encounter",

      ]
    }
  }

    Rocky Outcrop

    {
  "_surge": {},
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "condition_board": {
      "func_name": "returns true if the current activation (attack, scheme, encounter...) matches the passed params. e.g. to check if attack is undefendedcurrent_activation_status",
      "func_params": {
        "undefended": true
      }
    },
    "event_name": "triggers after an enemy attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was stunnedenemy_attack_happened",
    "trigger": "villain",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "heal [subjects]. Can be used as a cost, in which case the heal must happen at least partially for the cost to be considered paidheal",
        "subject": "villain",
        "amount": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",
            "func_params": {
              "token_name": "delay",
              "subject": "main_scheme"
            },
            "comparison": "ge",
            "comparison_value": 5
          },
          "then": 2,
          "else": 1
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Self-Propelled Glide

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "ready a specific card (also see exhaust)ready_card",
        "subject": "my_hero"
      },
      {
        "name": "adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)temporary_effect",
        "end_condition": "triggered when a round ends. Also see phase_endedround_ended",
        "subject": "my_hero",
        "effect": {
          "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
            "all": [
              {
                "filter_task": "get_property",
                "filter_property_name": "trait_aerial",
                "filter_state_trigger": [
                  {
                    "filter_properties": {
                      "Name": "Spider-Woman"
                    }
                  }
                ],
                "alteration": 1
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}

      }
    ]
  }
}

    Skilled Investigator

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "max_per_hero_any": 1
      }
    ]
  },
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject]cards to a specific hero boardmove_to_player_zone",
        "subject": "boardseek",
        "subject_count": "all",
        "selection_count": 1,
        "selection_type": "equal",
        "needs_selection": true,
        "filter_state_seek": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_identities",
            "filter_max_per_hero": 1
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "card_defeated": {
    "filter_state_trigger": [
      {
        "filter_group": "group_side_schemes"
      }
    ],
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_response"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "self"
      },
      {
        "name": "the owner of [subject]cards draws cardsdraw_cards",
        "amount": 1
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Sky Cycle

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "target",

            "filter_properties": {
              "type_code": "ally"

              "trait_avenger": 0
            },
            "filter_max_per_host": 1
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "self"
      },
      {
        "name": "ready a specific card (also see exhaust)ready_card",
        "subject": "host"
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "trait_aerial",
        "trigger": "host",
        "alteration": 1
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Sniper Shot

    {
  "reveal": {

      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",

    Snowy Hillside

    {
  "_surge": {},
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "condition_board": {
      "func_name": "returns true if the current activation (attack, scheme, encounter...) matches the passed params. e.g. to check if attack is undefendedcurrent_activation_status",
      "func_params": {
        "undefended": true
      }
    },
    "event_name": "triggers after an enemy attack occured. Attack needs to happen for this to trigger, this will not trigger e.g. if enemy was stunnedenemy_attack_happened",
    "trigger": "villain",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
        "subject": "main_scheme",
        "amount": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",
            "func_params": {
              "token_name": "delay",
              "subject": "main_scheme"
            },
            "comparison": "ge",
            "comparison_value": 5
          },
          "then": 2,
          "else": 1
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

  "manual": {

      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",

        "name": "does nothing, but used for example to ensure some conditioi is met, as a costnop",

        "subject": "target",

            "filter_group": "group_enemies"
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "attack",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "subject": "previous",
        "amount": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",
            "func_params": {
              "token_name": [
                "confused"
              ],
              "subject": "previous"
            }
          },
          "then": 5,
          "else": 3
        },
        "tags": [
          "arrow"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 1,
        "token_name": "confused",
        "needs_subject": true,
        "subject": "previous"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Steel Kick

    {
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in alter ego formreveal_alter_ego": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "adds threat to subjectsadd_threat",
        "subject": "main_scheme",

          "if": {
            "func_name": "has_trait",
            "func_params": {
              "subject": "villain",
              "trait": "metal"
            }
          },
          "then": 3,
          "else": 2
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in hero formreveal_hero": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "indirect_damage",
        "amount": {
          "if": {
            "func_name": "has_trait",

    Swinging Stone

    {
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in alter ego formreveal_alter_ego": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)temporary_effect",
        "end_condition": "enemy_activation_finished",
        "subject": "villain",
        "effect": {
          "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
            "all": [
              {
                "filter_task": "get_property",
                "filter_property_name": "The Villain schemesscheme",
                "trigger": "villain",
                "alteration": {
                  "if": {
                    "func_name": "has_trait",
                    "func_params": {
                      "subject": "villain",
                      "trait": "stone"
                    }
                  },
                  "then": 1,
                  "else": 0
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "subject enemy (typically the villain) starts a scheme actionenemy_schemes",
        "subject": "villain"
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in hero formreveal_hero": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "adds a temporary effect on a card, which stays until a specific event is triggered (typically for event cards that grant a benefit -alterant- until end of round or phase)temporary_effect",
        "end_condition": "enemy_activation_finished",
        "subject": "villain",
        "effect": {
          "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
            "all": [
              {
                "filter_task": "get_property",
                "filter_property_name": "attack",
                "trigger": "villain",
                "alteration": {
                  "if": {
                    "func_name": "has_trait",
                    "func_params": {
                      "subject": "villain",
                      "trait": "stone"
                    }
                  },
                  "then": 1,
                  "else": 0
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "Triggers an attack of the villain against current herovillain_attacks_you"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    {
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "event_name": "triggers when an identity changed from hero to alter_ego or vice versaidentity_changed_form",
    "event_filters": {
      "after": "hero"
    },
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "src_container": "deck_villain",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain"

          "func_name": "Returns number of boost icons on subjectcount_boost_icons",

    Taskmaster - 2

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": {
      "_rules": {
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true,
        "forced": true
      },
      "Deal encounter": [
        {
          "name": "deal an encounter to current herodeal_encounter",
          "subject": "my_hero"
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt/response checks. Currently Response events are hardcoded to act exactly like interruptsresponse": {
    "event_name": "triggers when an identity changed from hero to alter_ego or vice versaidentity_changed_form",
    "event_filters": {
      "after": "hero"
    },
    "board": [

        "subject": "index",
        "subject_index": "top",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "src_container": "deck_villain",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain"
      },
      {
        "name": "deal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damagedeal_damage",

          "func_name": "Returns number of boost icons on subjectcount_boost_icons",

  }
}

      },
      {
        "name": "deal damage to [subject]. also see receive_damagedeal_damage",
        "amount": {
          "func_name": "Returns number of boost icons on subjectcount_boost_icons",
          "func_params": {
            "subject": "previous"
          }
        },
        "subject": "trigger"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Taskmaster's Shield

    {
  "when a card moves to the board (excluding any pile e.g. discard, deck, etc...)card_moved_to_board": {
    "trigger": "self",
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "attach script owner to subjectattach_to_card",
        "subject": "villain"
      }
    ]
  },
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {
    "board": [
      {
        "filter_task": "get_property",
        "filter_property_name": "retaliate",
        "trigger": "host",
        "alteration": 1
      }
    ]
  },
  "manual": {
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "exhausts [subject] cards. See ready_cardexhaust_card",
        "subject": "my_hero",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "pay a specific cost (not necessarily the card's costpay_cost",
        "cost": {
          "mental": 1,
          "physical": 1
        },
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "subject": "self"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    The Island of Dr. Zola

    {
  "special trigger for setup on some cardssetup": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "deal an encounter to current herodeal_encounter",
        "immediate_reveal": true,
        "subject": "tutor",
        "src_container": "deck_villain",
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Hydra Prison"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
        "subject": "tutor",
        "src_container": "deck_villain",
        "grid_name": "enemies_my_hero",
        "filter_state_tutor": [
          {
            "filter_properties": {
              "Name": "Ultimate Bio-Servant"
            }
          }
        ],
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true
      }
    ]
  },
  "step_ended": {
    "event_filters": {
      "step_name": "VILLAIN_THREAT"
    },
    "board": [
      {
        "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
        "modification": 1,
        "token_name": "test",
        "subject": "self"
      },
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "if": {
                "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",
                "func_params": {
                  "token_name": "test",
                  "subject": "self"
                },
                "comparison": "ge",
                "comparison_value": 3
              },
              "then": 1,
              "else": 0
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
                "subject": "grab_until",
                "src_container": "deck_villain",
                "dest_container": "discard_villain",
                "filter_state_grab_until": [
                  {
                    "filter_properties": {
                      "type_code": "minion"
                    }
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "name": "move [subjects] cards to the boards, sometimes specifying a grid locationmove_card_to_board",
                "subject": "index",
                "subject_count": 1,
                "grid_name": "enemies_first_player",
                "subject_index": "retrieve_integer",
                "src_container": "deck_villain"
              },
              {
                "name": "modify tokens on the card. See Damage, threat, stunned, confused, etc...mod_tokens",
                "modification": -3,
                "token_name": "test",
                "subject": "self"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

                "func_name": "count number of tokens of a specific typecount_tokens",

    The Red House

    {
  "a special trigger keyword for modifications that alter values of cards on the boardalterants": {

  },
  "special trigger used for interrupt checksinterrupt": {
    "event_name": "removes threat from [subject] schemes. Also see thwart.remove_threat",
    "event_filters": {
      "target": "self",
      "tags": [
        "either removes a given amount of threat, or starts a thwart action from a character. Also see remove_threatthwart"
      ]
    },
    "filter_state_trigger": [
      {
        "filter_group": "group_friendly"
      }
    ],
    "is_optional_board": true,
    "board": {
      "Use THW": [
        {
          "name": "does nothing, but used for example to ensure some conditioi is met, as a costnop"
        }
      ],
      "Use ATK": [
        {
          "name": "replaces some task on the stack with something else (e.g. damage replaced, targets, replaced, etc...)replacement_effect",
          "subject": "interrupted_event",
          "replacements": {
            "amount": {
              "func_name": "get_subject_int_property",
              "func_params": {
                "property": "attack",
                "subject": "trigger"
              }
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

      "_rules": {

        {

          "subject": "my_hero"
        },
        {
          "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",

          "subject": "self"
        }
      ],

    Venom Blast

    {
  "manual": {
    "hand": [
      {
        "name": "an ability that does nothing but is used as a cost to constraint when a card/ability can be used. Typically, Hero vs Alter Ego form, etc...constraints",
        "this part of the script is a cost. Typically the script won't get executed unless all costs can be paidis_cost": true,
        "tags": [
          "hero_action"
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "attack",
        "subject": "target",
        "amount": 5,
        "needs_subject": true,
        "filter_state_subject": [
          {
            "filter_group": "group_enemies"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Weapon Master

    {
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in alter ego formreveal_alter_ego": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "subject enemy (typically the villain) starts a scheme actionenemy_schemes",
        "subject": "villain"
      },
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "count_attachments",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "villain",
                "filter_state_attachment": [
                  {
                    "filter_properties": {
                      "comparison": "gt",
                      "trait_weapon": 0
                    }
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger that will be prioritized over 'reveal' if it's available and if the current identity is in hero formreveal_hero": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "Triggers an attack of the villain against current herovillain_attacks_you"
      },
      {
        "name": "allows to run one of several optional tasks (nested_tasks) based on the result of a condition checkconditional_script",
        "options": [
          {
            "condition": {
              "func_name": "count_attachments",
              "func_params": {
                "subject": "villain",
                "filter_state_attachment": [
                  {
                    "filter_properties": {
                      "comparison": "gt",
                      "trait_weapon": 0
                    }
                  }
                ]
              }
            },
            "nested_tasks": [
              {
                "name": "triggers an encounter surgesurge"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

    Zola - 3

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": {
      "_rules": {
        "this will internally duplicate this part of the script for each hero in game (and assign containers accordingly for each player, e.g hand becomes hand1, hand2, hand3,)for_each_player": true,
        "forced": true
      },
      "Minion": [
        {
          "name": "reveals encounters as described by subjects, otherwise failsreveal_encounters",
          "subject": "tutor",
          "src_container": [
            "deck_villain",
            "discard_villain"
          ],
          "subject_count": "all",
          "selection_count": 1,
          "selection_type": "equal",
          "needs_selection": true,
          "filter_state_tutor": [
            {
              "filter_properties2": {
                "type_code": "minion"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        {
          "name": "shuffle_container",
          "dest_container": "deck_villain"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}

    {
  "reveal": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "move [subject] cards to a specific container (aka pile)move_card_to_container",
        "subject": "grab_until",

        "dest_container": "discard_villain",
        "filter_state_grab_until": [

            },

            }
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "owner of the script will become the host of the subjects. Can be used to steal cards for examplehost_card",
        "subject": "index",
        "subject_count": 1,
        "subject_index": "retrieve_integer",
        "src_container": "deck_villain",
        "tags": [
          "disable_attach_trigger"
        ],
        "_comments": "disable_attach_trigger in tags prevents the attachment from moving somewhere else as it comes into play"
      }
    ]
  },
  "special trigger called for card's boost star abilitiesboost": {
    "all": [
      {
        "name": "shullfes subject cards into dest_containershuffle_card_into_container",

  }
